title: Global Solutions Architect, Automotive & Manufacturing, Automotive&Manufacturing EMEA SA
description:
**Description**
 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is looking for experienced and motivated technologists who possess a unique balance of technical depth and strong interpersonal skills. You will partner some of the worlds largest Automotive and Manufacturing companies, to craft highly scalable, flexible and resilient cloud architectures that address customer business problems and accelerate the adoption of AWS services. In collaboration with account managers, you will assist in driving growth across a set of global customers in your defined country. As a trusted customer advocate, the solutions architect will help organizations understand best practices around advanced cloud-based solutions, and how to migrate existing workloads to the cloud. You will have the opportunity to help shape and execute a strategy to build mind share and broad use of AWS within enterprise customers. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, products, and technical challenges.
   

  

**Here Are Some Other Qualities We Are Looking For**
 Be great fun to work with.
   

  

 At AWS, we have a credo of “Work hard. Have fun. Make history”. In this role, you will love what you do, and instinctively know how to make work fun. You will be dynamic and creative, and willing to take on any challenge and make a big impact.
   

  

 Enjoy working with large, global customers. You will have a passion for educating, training, designing, and building cloud solutions for a diverse and challenging set of enterprise customers.
   

  

 Have a strong understanding of large scale computing solutions. The ideal candidate will have past experience working as a systems or support engineer. You will enjoy keeping your existing technical skills honed and developing new ones, so you can make strong contributions to deep architecture discussions. You will regularly take part in deep-dive education and design exercises to create world-class solutions built on AWS.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Serve as a trusted technical and AI advisor to customers, understanding their business needs and technology challenges to architect customized solutions
* Lead discussions to shape a customer's long-term technology and AI strategy and guide them on trade-offs between short-term fixes and extensible, scalable solutions
* Design end-to-end solutions leveraging both technical expertise and business acumen, driving consensus across multiple teams to deliver impactful solutions
* Proactively identify opportunities to accelerate implementation through reusable components, parallel workstreams, etc.
* Share knowledge by developing technical content like sample code, presentations, workshops to exemplify best practices and educate customers
* Drive product innovation by gathering customer feedback, translating needs into clear requirements, and partnering with product teams through development
* Resolve complex technical problems through root cause analysis, both for customers and internally
* Contribute strategic planning, recruiter/develop talent, build team consensus, and provide guidance to more junior solutions architects


 A day in the life
   

  

* Review customer requirements and technical challenges, focusing on opportunities to implement complex solutions architectures that can transform business outcomes also leveraging AI capabilities
* Develop proof-of-concepts that demonstrate how cloud solutions can transform business processes
* Influence service team leadership and product marketing on the future needs for customers, prioritizing roadmap features and GTM messaging
* Dedicate time to continuous learning about the latest advancements in AWS service capabilities
* Participate in knowledge sharing activities with colleagues, creating field enablement materials to help other SAs understand how to integrate cloud solutions into customer architectures


**About The Team**
 The AWS Industries team is committed to helping industry customers enable their digital transformation journeys. Our primary goal is to meet customers in their cloud and AI journey and work backwards from their industry-specific needs to transform their businesses and industries. Our team focuses on business outcomes and industry use cases on behalf of our customers, whether that is how we build products and solutions, how we sell, how we deliver, or how we partner.
   

  

 The Automotive & Manufacturing Solutions Architecture team is dedicated to accelerating AWS cloud adoption across strategic automotive and manufacturing accounts. Our mission is to drive tangible business value through focused execution on strategic projects, while enabling scale by up-skilling broader field teams. We work at the intersection of technology and industry-specific transformation, partnering closely with account teams, technology specialists, and industry specialist teams to deliver comprehensive solutions.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent, or experience in a professional field or military
* Experience in IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries
* Experience within specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data & analytics).
* Experience in design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures
* Experience communicating across technical and non-technical audiences, including executive level stakeholders or clients


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in infrastructure architecture, database architecture and networking
* Experience working with end user or developer communities
* Experience with presentations and speaking with executives, IT, management, and developers


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch) - G54

title: Principal GenAI GTM Specialist, WWSO
description:
**Description**
 Are you a customer-obsessed builder with a passion for helping enterprises unlock transformative value from Generative AI? Do you combine deep technical proficiency in GenAI — foundation models, Amazon Bedrock, agentic architectures — with the business acumen to land AI transformation programmes tied to real customer outcomes? Do you thrive at the intersection of technology strategy and commercial execution? Join the EMEA Go-to-Market Specialist Team to lead the GenAI transformation agenda across one of AWS's highest-growth and most strategic domains.
   

  

 The Worldwide Specialist Organization (WWSO) is part of AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS). We work backwards from our customers' most complex and business-critical problems to build and execute go-to-market plans that turn AWS ideas into multi-billion-dollar businesses. WWSO teams include business development, specialist solutions architecture, and go-to-market.
   

  

 This is a Principal-level GenAI GTM Specialist role responsible for driving enterprise Generative AI adoption across EMEA. Rather than owning a single service, you will own the cross-cutting GenAI transformation narrative — spanning Amazon Bedrock, agentic architectures, foundation model strategy, and emerging GenAI capabilities — and translate it into use-case-led motions that land measurable business outcomes in customers.
   

  

 What We're Looking For
   

  

* Deep technical proficiency in Generative AI: foundation models, agentic patterns, and the Amazon Bedrock ecosystem.
* Demonstrated ability to land AI/ML transformation programmes in enterprise customers translating technology capability into business outcomes by use case.
* A blend of technical depth and commercial savvy equally comfortable whiteboarding a Think Big architecture and presenting an AI strategy to a C-suite.
* Experience building and executing GTM strategies at scale in a fast-moving technology domain.


 Track record of operating as a thought leader and trusted advisor to senior customer stakeholders.
   

  

* Ability to thrive in a high-ambiguity, high-velocity environment and shape direction without waiting for permission
* Data-driven approach to prioritization using pipeline data, propensity signals, and market intelligence to focus effort where it matters most
* Experience in enterprise technology sales, solutions architecture, or technical business development with a focus on AI/ML or cloud platforms
* Strong written and verbal communication able to author SLT-level narratives, field-facing plays, and customer-facing positioning with equal fluency


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Own the EMEA GenAI GTM strategy end-to-end driving enterprise adoption of Amazon Bedrock and complementary GenAI services through use case led motion, define the narrative, identify high-impact use-case patterns.
* Land AI transformation in enterprises: develop and execute account-level GenAI strategies for priority industries, mapping business priorities to GenAI use cases, building transformation roadmaps, and guiding customers from proof-of-concept to production at scale.
* Operate at the CxO/VP and practitioner level: engage senior business leaders on AI strategy and value realisation while simultaneously working with developers, ML engineers, and architects on technical solution design and adoption patterns.
* Build and execute scaled GTM programmes : design motions including customer roundtables, GenAI workload assessments, use-case workshops, developer engagement, and regional campaigns that create demand and accelerate adoption.
* Thought Leadership : Create packaged deliverables (propensity models, use-case frameworks) and drive enablement that raises the bar across the EMEA field.
* Be the voice of EMEA customers to Product: synthesise regional customer requirements, competitive signals, and adoption blockers into actionable feedback that shapes Amazon Bedrock and GenAI service roadmaps.
* Influence Marketing: co-develop thought leadership, digital campaigns, and customer success stories that position AWS as the platform of choice for enterprise GenAI transformation.
* Drive cross-functional alignment across Specialist, Field, Partner, and Marketing teams to ensure consistent messaging and coordinated execution


 A day in the life
   

  

 You will lead the go-to-market strategy for one of the most exciting and high-growth domains in cloud. No two days are the same. You might start your morning on a deep-dive with a Fortune 500 financial services CTO mapping their enterprise-wide GenAI transformation roadmap — identifying the highest-value use cases, from intelligent document processing to autonomous customer service agents. After lunch, you're running a use-case workshop with a major retailer's engineering team, helping them see how Amazon Bedrock can power their next-generation product discovery experience and building the business case to take to their board. Later, you're jumping into a pipeline review with an Area AI/ML sales leader to pressure-test which opportunities are ready to move from pilot to production, before briefing a product team on what EMEA customers need next from Bedrock based on patterns you're seeing across dozens of enterprise engagements.
   

  

 You'll collaborate daily with account teams, solution architects, partner managers, and AWS service teams — connecting the dots between customer business priorities, GenAI technical capabilities, and market opportunity. Your job is to make the complex simple: translating the art of the possible in Generative AI into concrete, use-case-led transformation programmes that customers can execute and measure. You operate as the connective tissue between what AWS builds and how enterprises adopt it at scale.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The EMEA WWSO AI/ML Geo Specialist team within AWS's Worldwide Specialist Organization owns and executes go-to-market strategy for the full portfolio of AWS AI/ML services. We serve customers across the complete AI lifecycle while also leading the way to drive net new innovative use cases in this domain. Our customers include some of the most technically sophisticated organizations in the world, and our work directly impacts how AI is built and deployed across EMEA.
   

  

 You will join a team of passionate builders who combine deep technical curiosity with commercial acumen. We operate with a startup mentality inside one of the world's largest technology companies—moving fast, experimenting boldly, and holding ourselves to the highest standards.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Experience in Go-To-Market, Business Development, Sales, or Consulting
* Experience developing strategies that influence leadership decisions at the organizational level
* Demonstrated technical proficiency in Generative AI concepts with the ability to credibly engage technical and business audiences.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience selling to Fortune 1000 or Global 2000 organizations
* Background that blends technical depth with commercial ownership (pipeline, revenue, GTM planning).

 Job ID: A10436777

title: Global Solutions Architect, Automotive & Manufacturing, Automotive&Manufacturing EMEA SA
description:
**Description**
 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is looking for experienced and motivated technologists who possess a unique balance of technical depth and strong interpersonal skills. You will partner some of the worlds largest Automotive and Manufacturing companies, to craft highly scalable, flexible and resilient cloud architectures that address customer business problems and accelerate the adoption of AWS services. In collaboration with account managers, you will assist in driving growth across a set of global customers in your defined country. As a trusted customer advocate, the solutions architect will help organizations understand best practices around advanced cloud-based solutions, and how to migrate existing workloads to the cloud. You will have the opportunity to help shape and execute a strategy to build mind share and broad use of AWS within enterprise customers. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, products, and technical challenges.
   

  

**Here Are Some Other Qualities We Are Looking For**
 Be great fun to work with.
   

  

 At AWS, we have a credo of “Work hard. Have fun. Make history”. In this role, you will love what you do, and instinctively know how to make work fun. You will be dynamic and creative, and willing to take on any challenge and make a big impact.
   

  

 Enjoy working with large, global customers. You will have a passion for educating, training, designing, and building cloud solutions for a diverse and challenging set of enterprise customers.
   

  

 Have a strong understanding of large scale computing solutions. The ideal candidate will have past experience working as a systems or support engineer. You will enjoy keeping your existing technical skills honed and developing new ones, so you can make strong contributions to deep architecture discussions. You will regularly take part in deep-dive education and design exercises to create world-class solutions built on AWS.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Serve as a trusted technical and AI advisor to customers, understanding their business needs and technology challenges to architect customized solutions
* Lead discussions to shape a customer's long-term technology and AI strategy and guide them on trade-offs between short-term fixes and extensible, scalable solutions
* Design end-to-end solutions leveraging both technical expertise and business acumen, driving consensus across multiple teams to deliver impactful solutions
* Proactively identify opportunities to accelerate implementation through reusable components, parallel workstreams, etc.
* Share knowledge by developing technical content like sample code, presentations, workshops to exemplify best practices and educate customers
* Drive product innovation by gathering customer feedback, translating needs into clear requirements, and partnering with product teams through development
* Resolve complex technical problems through root cause analysis, both for customers and internally
* Contribute strategic planning, recruiter/develop talent, build team consensus, and provide guidance to more junior solutions architects


 A day in the life
   

  

* Review customer requirements and technical challenges, focusing on opportunities to implement complex solutions architectures that can transform business outcomes also leveraging AI capabilities
* Develop proof-of-concepts that demonstrate how cloud solutions can transform business processes
* Influence service team leadership and product marketing on the future needs for customers, prioritizing roadmap features and GTM messaging
* Dedicate time to continuous learning about the latest advancements in AWS service capabilities
* Participate in knowledge sharing activities with colleagues, creating field enablement materials to help other SAs understand how to integrate cloud solutions into customer architectures


**About The Team**
 The AWS Industries team is committed to helping industry customers enable their digital transformation journeys. Our primary goal is to meet customers in their cloud and AI journey and work backwards from their industry-specific needs to transform their businesses and industries. Our team focuses on business outcomes and industry use cases on behalf of our customers, whether that is how we build products and solutions, how we sell, how we deliver, or how we partner.
   

  

 The Automotive & Manufacturing Solutions Architecture team is dedicated to accelerating AWS cloud adoption across strategic automotive and manufacturing accounts. Our mission is to drive tangible business value through focused execution on strategic projects, while enabling scale by up-skilling broader field teams. We work at the intersection of technology and industry-specific transformation, partnering closely with account teams, technology specialists, and industry specialist teams to deliver comprehensive solutions.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent, or experience in a professional field or military
* Experience in IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries
* Experience within specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data & analytics).
* Experience in design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures
* Experience communicating across technical and non-technical audiences, including executive level stakeholders or clients
* Cloud Computing


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in infrastructure architecture, database architecture and networking
* Experience working with end user or developer communities
* Experience with presentations and speaking with executives, IT, management, and developers
* Automotive domain expertise

 Job ID: A10436937

title: Software Development Engineer – 2026
description:
**Description**
 Do you want to solve real customer problems through innovative technology? Do you enjoy working on scalable services in a collaborative team environment? Do you want to see your code directly impact millions of customers worldwide?
   

  

 At Amazon, we hire the best minds in technology to innovate and build on behalf of our customers. Customer obsession is part of our company DNA, which has made us one of the world's most beloved brands.
   

  

 Our Software Development Engineers (SDEs) use modern technology to solve complex problems while seeing their work's impact first-hand. The challenges SDEs solve at Amazon are meaningful and influence millions of customers, sellers, and products globally. We seek individuals passionate about creating new products, features, and services while managing ambiguity in an environment where development cycles are measured in weeks, not years.
   

  

 At Amazon, we believe in ownership at every level. As an SDE-I, you'll own the entire lifecycle of your code - from design through deployment and ongoing operations. This ownership mindset, combined with our commitment to operational excellence, ensures we deliver the highest quality solutions for our customers.
   

  

 We're looking for curious minds who think big and want to define tomorrow's technology. At Amazon, you'll grow into the high-impact engineer you know you can be, supported by a culture of learning and mentorship. Every day brings exciting new challenges and opportunities for personal growth.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Collaborate and communicate effectively with experienced cross-disciplinary Amazonians to design, build, and operate innovative products and services that delight our customers, while participating in technical discussions to drive solutions forward
* Design and develop scalable solutions using cloud-native architectures and microservices in a large distributed computing environment
* Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical documentation
* Build and maintain resilient distributed systems that are scalable, fault-tolerant, and cost-effective
* Leverage and contribute to the development of GenAI and AI-powered tools to enhance development productivity while staying current with emerging technologies
* Write clean, maintainable code following best practices and design patterns
* Work in an agile environment practicing CI/CD principles while participating in operational responsibilities including on-call duties
* Demonstrate operational excellence through monitoring, troubleshooting, and resolving production issues


**Basic Qualifications**
* Education Requirements (must meet one): Currently enrolled in Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Data Science, Information Systems, or related STEM fields OR Completed Bachelor's or Graduate degree in specified fields
* Expected graduation between October 2025 - September 2026, OR graduated within the last 24 months
* Demonstrated experience with at least one general-purpose programming language such as Java, Python, C++, C#, Go, Rust, or TypeScript
* Demonstrated experience one or more of the following: Data structures implementation, Basic algorithm development, Object-oriented design principles


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Previous technical internship(s) or demonstrated project experience
* Experience with one or more of the following: AI tools for development productivity, Cloud platforms (preferably AWS), Database systems (SQL and NoSQL), Contributing to open-source projects, Version control systems, Debugging and troubleshooting complex systems
* Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly
* Basic understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC)

 Job ID: A3119051

title: Forward Deployed Engineer | Saab
description:
*Want to influence the bigger picture? At Saab, you can realize amazing innovations that keep people and societies safe. Together, we can truly make an impact – and your part matters.* 









*Common Tech is the engine behind Saab’s technological transformation—building the shared platforms, capabilities, and foundations that enable the entire organization to scale, innovate, and deliver at speed.* 









*Within this ecosystem, Product Tech plays a unique role—bridging the gap between technology and real-world impact. It ensures that the capabilities built in Common Tech are not just available—but adopted, integrated, and used where it matters most: in real products, by real teams. A particular focus lies on AI-based solutions that will be integrated into Saab's product portfolio and used broadly across the organization. What you help create in Product Tech has direct impact across multiple products, teams and business areas. Product Tech is where Saab’s future technology is shaped—and where it is brought into real use across the whole organization.* 




  





**Do you want to help bridge the gap between today and the future - and play a key role in driving Saab's digital transformation?** 




 This is not a traditional developer role. It's a role for curious minds who enjoy variety, creativity and deep technical thinking.
 



  





**Your role** 




 We are now looking for a Forward Deployed Engineer to join Product Tech at Saab. You will play a key role in both strategic important digitalization initiatives and Forward Deployed engagements, helping accelerate innovation and enable real impact across the organization.
 



  





 This role sits at the heart of Saab's digital strategy execution model, where different types of engagements come together:
 


* Strategic, business-critical initiatives focused on developing new solutions and pushing the boundaries of current capabilities
* High-impact efforts where you enable teams adopt and implement modern technologies, platforms, and ways of working in real product environments



 As a Forward Deployed Engineer you will operate across both - building new capabilities while also ensuring they are successfully deployed, adopted, and used in practice.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Work hands-on with complex technical problems across different product areas
* Build and improve shared platforms and components used throughout Saab
* Explore and apply technologies like AI, cloud, edge computing and real-time systems
* Collaborate with engineers, architects and domain experts
* Turn ambiguous challenges into clear, elegant solutions
* Influence technical direction and long-term platform strategy



  





**Your profile** 




 We believe you thrive in environments where you balance hands-on development with enabling others to succeed. You enjoy building new solutions, improving existing platforms, and helping teams move forward in situations where requirements evolve and ambiguity is part of the journey.
 



  





 You bring a strong software engineering background combined with a pragmatic, solution-oriented mindset. You are comfortable navigating complex and fast-moving environments, bringing structure, clarity, and technical direction when needed. At the same time, you enjoy collaborating with others, sharing knowledge, and supporting teams through coaching and technical leadership while remaining hands-on.
 



  





**Experience** 



* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent work experience
* Minimum 2 years of experience in software engineering/development, preferably within complex systems or product environments
* Proven experience working with cloud-based solutions, CI/CD pipelines, and modern software development practices, system design and architecture, preferably in modular or distributed systems
* Experience and/or understanding of how AI and data can be applied to create real-world value in products, beyond experimentation or prototyping



  





**Technical competence** 



* Strong capability to design, build, and integrate solutions within cloud, data, and/or AI domains
* Experience working with modular architecture and reusable building blocks
* Ability to develop robust, scalable, and reusable solutions that can be leveraged across teams and products
* Understanding of how to design future-proof systems that support long-term evolution and reuse



  





**Personal qualities** 



* Curious and eager to explore new technologies, tools, and ways of working
* Collaborative mindset with strong communication and coaching skills
* Comfortable working in environments where priorities and requirements evolve over time
* Ability to create structure, clarity, and direction in complex environments
* Motivated by enabling both technology and people to grow



  





**Bonus if you have** 



* Experience from real-time or safety-critical environments



  





*Some of our roles require security clearance under Swedish security protection legislation. For roles where Saab has requirements for security classification, this may in some cases entail requirements for a certain citizenship.* 




  





**What you become part of** 




**Common Tech** 
 is the engine behind Saab’s technological transformation—building the shared platforms, capabilities, and foundations that enable the entire organization to scale, innovate, and deliver at speed.
 



  





 Within this ecosystem,
 **Product Tech** 
 plays a unique role—bridging the gap between technology and real-world impact. It ensures that the capabilities built in Common Tech are not just available—but adopted, integrated, and used where it matters most: in real products, by real teams. A particular focus lies on AI-based solutions that will be integrated into Saab's product portfolio and used broadly across the organization. What you help create in Product Tech has direct impact across multiple products, teams and business areas. Product Tech is where Saab’s future technology is shaped—and where it is brought into real use across the whole organization.
 



  





**Saab** 
 is a leading defence and security company with a clear mission: to help protect people and societies. With around 20,000 employees worldwide, Saab develops advanced technology through close collaboration between people, competencies and disciplines. The company is characterised by an inclusive culture where collaboration, learning and long-term development are central.
 



  





*These positions require approved security clearance under Swedish security protection legislation.* 




  





**Application** 




 This recruitment process is managed by Jefferson Wells on behalf of Saab, meaning you will be directly employed by Saab. For questions about the position, please contact recruiter Mark Ferrer or Sara Takahashi.
 



  





 We do not accept applications by email due to GDPR.
 



  





**Selection and interviews are ongoing. We warmly welcome your application!**

title: UX Design Specialist (Lead)
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**  

We are looking for an experienced UX Design Specialist to lead UX direction and execution across a product area. This is a hands-on leadership role where you'll drive design strategy, coordinate UX efforts across multiple teams, and ensure cohesive, high-quality user experiences are delivered.


Rather than managing people directly, you will lead through design expertise, collaboration, and strategic influence—working closely with product managers, engineers, researchers, and business stakeholders to integrate UX into the product development lifecycle.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lead UX strategy and execution across multiple products and cross-functional teams.
* Define and align UX direction with broader product and business objectives.
* Plan and prioritize UX design efforts, ensuring the right level of design investment across initiatives.
* Own the end-to-end design process—from discovery and problem framing through prototyping, validation, and production readiness.
* Utilize AI tools throughout the design workflow for ideation, research synthesis, content generation, rapid prototyping, and design validation.
* Create prototypes using Figma and code to validate concepts before implementation.
* Collaborate closely with Product Management, Engineering, and business stakeholders to embed UX into planning and delivery processes.
* Clearly communicate design trade-offs, highlighting impacts on user experience, timelines, and technical feasibility.
* Drive consistency by promoting design systems, UX standards, and scalable design practices.
* Mentor and influence designers by sharing AI best practices, design patterns, and UX methodologies.
* Identify design quality risks and recommend improvements to strengthen overall design maturity.
* Present design rationale and strategic recommendations to leadership, connecting UX decisions to measurable business outcomes.
* Participate in design critiques and cross-functional reviews to continuously raise design quality.

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Design, or a related discipline (or equivalent professional experience).
* 8+ years of professional UX design experience, including leading UX initiatives across multiple teams or product areas.
* Strong portfolio demonstrating strategic design leadership, end-to-end product delivery, and measurable business impact.
* Deep expertise across the UX discipline, including:


	+ User Research
	+ Information Architecture
	+ Interaction Design
	+ Visual Design
	+ Prototyping
	+ UX Writing
	+ User Journey Mapping
* Experience planning and allocating UX resources across multiple initiatives based on business priorities and user impact.
* Practical experience leveraging AI tools throughout the design lifecycle, including large language models (LLMs), AI-assisted design workflows, and code-based prototyping.
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills with the ability to influence product and engineering leadership.
* Experience working in Agile environments, including Sprint Planning and Program Increment (PI) Planning.
* Comfortable designing complex ecosystems involving multiple user roles, cross-platform experiences, and digital-physical interactions.
* Strong understanding of design systems, accessibility, usability principles, and scalable design practices.

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Senior/Lead Economy and Engagement Designer - ARC Raiders
description:
As a Senior/Lead Economy and Engagement Designer at Embark, you will be responsible for designing and implementing systems and mechanics that are deep and interesting for our players to engage with and retain them, short, medium and long term, as well as sustainable and player-friendly monetization features and models, that provide real value to our players, in a fair way.


You will join the team on ARC Raiders and collaborate closely with the directors of the project, in refining concepts and ideas into tangible designs, prototypes and features, as well as Production leadership helping in articulating and establishing estimates, project scope and timelines. You will share your insights and knowledge in shaping relevant performance indicators, as well as validation methods using telemetry data and simulations.


As a senior member of the design team we would like you to act as a coach and mentor to some of the other designers on the project, and possibly take on direct managerial responsibilities, if relevant and suitable. Inspiring and helping more junior designers with design methodology, documentation practices, etc.


You will also own and spearhead game features directly, and work hands-on in cross disciplinary teams while implementing features and tools for running a successful and smooth live service game, including community events and other types of events.

 **Example of responsibilities**

* Design, implementation and evaluation of our monetization strategy including quantitative and qualitative analysis, as well as any available automation and simulation strategies.
* Understanding player motivations and how they relate to our game loops, especially in terms of delivering a fun gameplay experience with engagement systems.
* Responsible for in-game virtual store including recommendations and contributions towards catalog and pricing strategy for micro-transactions.
* Joint optimization with marketing, acquisition and crm teams for the entire user journey.
* Be a key stakeholder in game frontend presentation and flow for engagement and game economy features.
* Design and collaborate on metagame, progression and economy systems for long term player retention and engagement.
* Analyze the impact of changes in the game, identify opportunities that will have a positive impact on monetization and engagement in development and post launch.
* Help define key performance indicators (KPIs) related to monetization, analyze KPI reports and share information with the team and stakeholders to identify and predict trends.
* Monitor trends on monetization in order to identify best practices, achieve optimal results and innovation.

**We would love if you have**

* A creative and curious mind.
* 5+ years or more experience in equivalent roles.
* An understanding of acquisition, retention and monetization concepts.
* Understanding of AAA gameplay and game design, including player psychology, UX design, gameplay design.
* Proficiency with the Unreal Engine and experience with Blueprints and scripting.
* Ability to design and continuously improve the optimization process of any given game.
* Experience with experimental design and/or AB Testing for data driven designs.
* Experience of coaching more junior members of the team.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to align cross-functional stakeholders
* Professional English communication skills.

  

This is an on-site role, and we are only considering candidates already residing in Sweden.


At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.  

  

Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Senior/Lead Economy and Engagement Designer - ARC Raiders
description:
As a Senior/Lead Economy and Engagement Designer at Embark, you will be responsible for designing and implementing systems and mechanics that are deep and interesting for our players to engage with and retain them, short, medium and long term, as well as sustainable and player-friendly monetization features and models, that provide real value to our players, in a fair way.
  
You will join the team on ARC Raiders and collaborate closely with the directors of the project, in refining concepts and ideas into tangible designs, prototypes and features, as well as Production leadership helping in articulating and establishing estimates, project scope and timelines. As a senior member of the design team we would like you to act as a coach and mentor to some of the other designers on the project, and possibly take on direct managerial responsibilities, if relevant and suitable. Inspiring and helping more junior designers with design methodology, documentation practices, etc.
  
You will also own and spearhead game features directly, and work hands-on in cross disciplinary teams while implementing features and tools for running a successful and smooth live service game, including community events and other types of events.

title: Product & Interactive Designer
description:
**We're Omoi — Europe's design agency for deep tech.** 
 Space, aerospace, AI, robotics, energy — we help companies with branding, strategy, design, content, and storytelling. Companies doing hard things that are hard to explain. But also companies that, every day, achieve the near-impossible.
 



 Since we started Omoi two years ago, we've worked with over 25 companies in over 7 countries, grown from two people to twelve, and helped our clients raise more than €300m in capital.
 



  





 We're looking for a
 **product / interactive designer** 
 who also has dev chops. Someone who can design a UI
 *and* 
 build it. Most people lean one way: taste without hands, or hands without taste. We want both. Someone who obsesses over type and rhythm as much as how a page feels under a cursor.
 



  





 The work spans brand and product sites, built out in Webflow, reaching for creative code when the idea demands it.
 



  





 We build our own things too — internal tools, and the odd product we might take to market. Fast, functional, forgettable — until someone gives it a real UI. Your job: make it look like it was made on purpose. Fluent with Claude Code, sharp enough to know when AI output is actually done, not just done-looking.
 



  





 This role is not for the faint of heart. We're a startup working for startups. Founders come to us and trust the future of their business to us. This is hard work that requires the patience, passion, and tenacity to always strive for better.
 



  





 We don't count years. Show us what you've made. If your portfolio has sites that feel alive. Projects that made you obsess over a transition or a load sequence until it was right. We want to see them.
 



 Our working language is English and all work happens in our studio in central Stockholm. We don't do remote work, we believe creative collaboration is best in-person.
 



  





 You'll get to be part of a team that has worked all around the world at companies like Bottega Veneta, Ogilvy & Mather, Gin Lane, Great Works, Kurppa Hosk, Laird & Partners, Collins, and more.
 



  





 To see examples of what we do, visit omoi.co. (It’s not fully updated because… you’re not here yet.)
 



  





 Please send your CV with a link to your portfolio — and, if you have them, links to live sites or apps you've built. We will do our utmost to get back to as many of you as possible.
 



  





**Note: Portfolio with design/sites is a requirement for us to review your work. We're unable to respond to any candidates who only responds with a CV.** 




  





 The role is ready to start immediately.
 



  





**What we're looking for:** 



* A portfolio of interactive, high-craft websites — the work matters far more than the years behind it
* Demonstrated ability to translate brand identity, messaging, and UX research into impactful, responsive designs in Figma — and to iterate quickly based on feedback without sacrificing quality
* Genuine skill in Webflow, with experience building performant, production-quality pages independently, from early layout and UI/UX through quality assurance testing and launch
* A strong eye for typography, layout, and motion
* An instinct for interaction and detail — the difference between a site that works and one that feels alive and delightful
* Comfortable building with AI tools like Claude Code as a real part of your process, not just a speed hack
* Bonus: creative-code chops (GSAP, Canvas, WebGL/Three.js) for when a concept can't be built any other way
* Experience with tech-forward or science-driven clients is a plus

title: Product Trainee Program
description:
Product Trainee Program - Stockholm
   

  

**Shape How Customers Discover And Experience Our Products.**
 Avarda's Product Trainee Program is an 18-month, learn-by-doing program for early-career talent who want to build a career in product. From day one you join a real team with a home domain and contribute to real work — supported by a dedicated mentor and structured exposure across our platform — with the possibility of growing into a junior Product Manager role.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

 Based in Stockholm, you'll join our Customer Acquisition & Experience track, working across the customer-facing surface — public web, checkout and post-purchase journeys. You'll build a deep understanding of how customers discover, apply for and interact with Avarda products, with a strong focus on conversion, onboarding flows, and the handoff between acquisition and servicing. Over the program you'll grow toward owning the requirements and roadmap input for a customer touchpoint end to end.
   

  

**Especially Relevant For This Track**
* Results-driven, with a strong interest in customer acquisition, digital customer journeys and user experience.
* Passionate about customer-centric products that balance business growth, data insight and a seamless experience across the full lifecycle — onboarding, activation, engagement and retention.
* A collaborative, analytical team player who thrives in cross-functional settings with product, tech, design and commercial teams.


 Who you are
   

  

 We hire for mindset and potential, not ready-made expertise.
   

  

* You learn fast and stay curious — you want to understand the why, and you're comfortable when things are complex or evolving.
* You think critically — you weigh trade-offs and challenge ideas constructively rather than settling for the obvious answer.
* You take ownership — you drive things forward and follow through without being chased.
* You communicate clearly in English and collaborate easily across product, tech and business.
* You're a team player with low ego — happy to do what's needed, focused on outcomes over status.
* You're genuinely interested in digital products and how they create value for customers and the business.


 Nice to have
   

  

* Some exposure to AI tools or AI-assisted workflows.
* A basic understanding of digital platforms, APIs or multi-sided markets.
* You're a recent graduate or early in your career. Studies in business or economics, technology or engineering, or product and innovation are all relevant — but mindset matters more than your degree subject.


 What we offer
   

  

* A structured 18-month program with a real role from day one.
* A home team and a dedicated mentor.
* Real ownership early — you deliver, you don't just observe.
* Structured cross-domain exposure across our product platform.
* A path to a permanent junior Product Manager role for strong performers.


 The details
   

  

* Location: Stockholm.
* Duration: 18 months. Full time.
* Target start date: September 1, 2026.

title: UX Designer inom sparande
description:
*Har du ett brinnande intresse för sparande, vill jobba brett inom hela spara området och vill vara med och forma framtidens sparupplevelse? Vi befinner oss i en spännande fas där vi satsar på att förbättra den digitala kundupplevelsen inom sparande. Det innebär att du hos oss inte bara vidareutvecklar befintliga lösningar – du är också med och bygger upp något nytt, och verkligen kan göra skillnad. Hjärtligt välkommen till Skandia* 
 ! 💚
   

  

**Att jobba som UX Designer inom sparande**
 Som UX Designer hos oss blir du en del av ett tvärfunktionellt team där du arbetar nära produktägare, utvecklare och specialister inom sparande. Du ansvarar för UX-arbetet från idé till färdig lösning och har en central roll i att skapa intuitiva och användbara tjänster.
   

  

**I Rollen Kommer Du Bland Annat Att**
* Driva UX-arbetet end-to-end – från behovsbild till utvecklingsklar design
* Ta fram wireframes, flöden och prototyper i Figma
* Omvandla komplexa regelverk, affärskrav och kundbehov till enkla och tydliga lösningar, färdiga att realiseras
* Säkerställa att designen är intuitiv och ligger i linje med hur sparlösningar förväntas fungera
* Samarbeta nära UX Lead och UX-kollegor inom bank, försäkring och pension för att skapa en sammanhållen kundupplevelse
* Bidra till utvecklingen av designprinciper och förbättring av befintligt designsystem


 Du kommer vara med och arbeta med hela sparresan – inte bara en del av den – vilket ger en bredd som ger verklig chans att förbättra kundupplevelsen.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Vi söker dig som har;
   

  

* En gedigen erfarenhet i rollen som UX Designer, gärna inom både web och app
* Erfarenhet av att driva UX-arbete självständigt från research till implementation
* Mycket god erfarenhet av Figma
* Erfarenhet av att designa lösningar som är redo för utveckling (hands-on, leveransfokus)
* God kommunikativ förmåga i svenska, både i tal och skrift
* Erfarenhet av UX arbete inom sparande (aktier, fonder, värdepapper) eller ett starkt och genuint privat intresse för sparande och investeringar


 Meriterande erfarenhet;
   

  

* Erfarenhet från bank, fintech eller annan regelverksstyrd verksamhet
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med eller påverka designsystem
* Erfarenhet av datadriven design och uppföljning av lösningar
* Van att arbeta i större organisationer med flera intressenter


 För att trivas och lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är en person som drivs av att få saker gjorda och skapa konkreta resultat. Du har en stark vilja att leverera och tycker om att omsätta idéer till fungerande lösningar i praktiken.
   

  

 Du är trygg i din kompetens och kan stå för dina designbeslut, samtidigt som du har förmågan att pedagogiskt förklara och förankra dem i dialog med andra. I en organisation med många kontaktytor är det viktigt att du kan navigera olika perspektiv och vågar vara en tydlig röst i gemensamma forum.
   

  

 Vi tror också att du har en naturlig nyfikenhet – både kring kundbeteenden och sparande som område – och att du drivs av att förstå hur man skapar användarupplevelser som faktiskt gör skillnad för kunden.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi arbetar med löpande urval, så skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag, men i och med stundande semestertider tar vi ett uppehåll i rekryteringsprocessen och
 **återupptar urval och intervjuerna i mitten av augusti** 
 . Varmt välkommen med din ansökan, och trevlig sommar! 🌞Utöver CV vill vi att du bifogar din designportfölj!
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen, vänligen kontakta rekryterande chef Ulf Ahrner på ulf.ahrner@skandia.se.
   

  

 Om har frågor kopplat till rekryteringsprocess, vänligen kontakta Susanne Hedberg på susanne.hedberg@skandia.se.
   

  

 Vi kommer att återkoppla till alla som söker oavsett om du går vidare eller inte.
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!**
 I den här processen har vi följande steg;
   

  

* Kortare avstämningsintervju
* Verksamhetsintervju
* Design Case
* Teamintervju
* Logik- och personlighetstest
* Slutdiskussion
* Bakgrundskontroll
* Referenstagning


**Mer om Banken**
 Vi har varit pionjärer inom digital bankverksamhet sedan starten 1994, som Sveriges första helt digitala bank. Med en passion för innovation och kundfokus har vi vuxit till att erbjuda ett brett utbud av produkter och tjänster inom områdena Låna, Spara och Betala – med särskilt fokus på bolån.
   

  

 Vår verksamhet är fördelad mellan Stockholm och Linköping. I Stockholm finns majoriteten av vår verksamhet, medan vår kundservice har sitt hjärta i Linköping. Tillsammans är vi cirka 270 medarbetare anställda på banken som varje dag skapar smarta lösningar för våra kunder.
   

  

**Vårt Erbjudande Inkluderar**
* Låna: Transparenta och attraktivt prissatta bolån
* Spara: Sparande i fonder och aktier samt på sparkonto
* Betala: Lönekonto samt smidiga kort- och betalningstjänster.


 Vi tror på att människor som utvecklas, presterar och mår bra är nyckeln till framgång. Hos oss är kompetensutveckling och lärande självklara delar av vardagen – framåt tillsammans!

title: Creative Content Producer
description:
**TÔNN furniture** 

 är ett svenskt möbelvarumärke som designar möbler för att fira vardagen. Vår största produkt är Portal, ett modulärt hyllsystem som är byggt för att förändras tillsammans med livet. Portal finns i lägenheter i Stockholm, townhouses i Amsterdam och familjehem i Berlin. Ofta planerat tillsammans med våra kunder, ibland ombyggt flera gånger under årens lopp.
 





 Vi startade 2011 och har vuxit organiskt sedan dess. Idag är vi ett litet team med stora ambitioner. De kommande åren siktar vi på att växa kraftigt på ett antal prioriterade marknader, lansera nya produkter och fortsätta bygga vidare på vår kärnprodukt Portal.
 





 Nu söker vi en Creative Content Producer som vill vara med på resan.
 




  





 Om rollen
 


 Du kommer att vara en viktig del av hur TÔNN känns, syns och upplevs.
 





 Vi tror på att testa mycket, lära oss snabbt och hela tiden förbättra vårt innehåll. Därför söker vi någon som både älskar estetik och är nyfiken på vad som faktiskt fungerar. Du förstår skillnaden mellan content som ser snyggt ut och content som säljer, och vet hur man kombinerar båda perspektiven.
 





 Du är lika bekväm med att klippa en annons som konverterar som att komma på nästa bildidé, boka en fotografering eller kontakta en kund vars hem skulle passa perfekt för ett kommande projekt.
 





 Hos oss är content inte något som produceras vid sidan av verksamheten. Det är en del av den. Du kommer träffa kunder som planerar sina hyllor, följa nya produkter från idé till lansering och dokumentera vardagen i ett företag som växer snabbt. 
 





 Ditt ansvar
 



* Producera content och klippa annonser för Meta, Google och Pinterest
* Äga och utveckla TÔNNs Instagram med över 45 000 följare
* Publicera innehåll och delta i dialogen med kunder och följare
* Skapa organiskt content i form av reels, stories, bilder och video
* Arbeta med befintligt råmaterial och skapa nytt vid fotograferingar
* Ta fram idéer till nya koncept, hooks och innehållsformat
* Initiera och boka fotograferingar tillsammans med kunder, kreatörer och partners
* Arbeta nära de övriga i teamet kring strategi, prioriteringar och innehåll



  





 Du som söker
 
* Har erfarenhet av att skapa content för sociala medier och digital annonsering
* Tycker att det är lika roligt att analysera resultat som att skapa innehållet
* Förstår vad som driver engagemang, trafik och försäljning
* Är van att arbeta i Adobe, Figma, Canva eller liknande verktyg
* Är självgående och gillar att ta egna initiativ
* Är nyfiken på teknik, AI och nya sätt att arbeta
* Är social och tycker om att skapa nya kontakter
* Har ett genuint intresse för inredning, design och varumärke





 ﻿
 





 Vi erbjuder
 
* En kreativ heltidsroll med stort eget ansvar
* Möjlighet att påverka hur ett växande internationellt varumärke utvecklas
* Ett litet team där idéer snabbt blir verklighet
* Möjlighet att vara med och bygga nästa kapitel i TÔNNs resa




 Tjänsten är baserad i Stockholm och utgår från vårt showroom och kontor på Södermalm, vårt lager i Sätra och de platser där våra hyllor finns.
 





 Skicka CV och portfolio med exempel på ads, reels eller annat content du är stolt över till work@tonnfurniture.com.

title: Senior Designer
description:
About Us
 



 We run a professional process and only share your profile with your consent. We hire continuously.
 



  





  





 Job Description
 



**Description of the assignment** 




 We are looking for a versatile Senior Designer to join our team in a hands-on, multi-disciplinary role. In this position, you will work on a wide variety of tasks—ranging from designing clean, effective presentations to creating motion graphics and 3D content. You should have a strong eye for visual design, a solid strategic mind, and the ability to take a concept from a rough idea to a polished final asset. Strong visual design skills and solid proficiency in 2D and 3D software, motion tools and AI tools are required. We value practical problem-solving, a collaborative mindset, and a passion for crafting great work. Please apply with your portfolio.
 



  





 You will join our Technology & Innovation team, a cross-functional group of designers and software and hardware developers. Focusing on light and interactive, "out-of-screen" experiences, you will collaborate closely with Design and Engineering teams to deliver next-generation in- and out-of-cabin experiences.
 



  





**Qualifications and skills required for the role** 




 • Bachelor’s degree in design field.
 



 • Design portfolio and/or show reel demonstrating a variety of projects.
 



 • Excellent visual and verbal communication skills, with the ability to effectively present and communicate design concepts and deliveries.
 



 • Strong problem-solving abilities and the capacity to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment.
 



 • Exceptional attention to detail and a passion for delivering high-quality content.
 



 • Understanding of human factors and user-centered design principles
 



 • Ability to collaborate effectively with multidisciplinary teams and external partners.
 



 • Hands-on proficiency in motion design, animation, and 2D and 3D visualization (After Effects, Blender, Adobe Creative Suite, Figma)
 



 • Proficient with using AI tools in the design process
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 




 • Conceive, develop, and deliver innovative automotive 'out-of-screen' experiences across exterior and interior domains, spanning the full design process from ideation and concept narratives through to tangible validation and final implementation support
 



 • Create and present design concepts and proposals to stakeholders, incorporating feedback and refining designs as necessary.
 



 • Resolve technical implementation challenges while maintaining alignment with brand identity
 



 • Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams across Sweden and China to ensure deliverables are visually compelling, functionally effective, and culturally appropriate
 



 • Deliver production ready assets and specifications
 



  





**Personal attributes** 




 Strong drive, communicative with good leadership skills, independent and confident as well as a good team player. Methodical and analytical with good planning skills. Flexible and able to work under constrained time schedules and frequently revised circumstances.
 



  





**Other** 




 • The assignment will take place in our studio in Gothenburg, and we have an ‘office first’ environment with some flexibility to WFH
 



 • Travel to China may be needed (approx. 2-3 trips per year).
 



 • Everyone in our team has a high level of responsibility and mandate and is expected to be able to work autonomously.
 



 • Fluent in English, spoken and written.
 



  





 Ready for your next career move? Explore opportunities at Co-Workertech.com
 



  





 Join our LinkedIn groups for updates on upcoming opportunities! Connect, collaborate, and thrive with industry leaders:
 



  




* Co-Worker Technology
* Co-Worker Renewable Energy Industry Jobs

title: Senior Conversation Designer - Experience Content Design
description:
Come shape the conversational experiences at the heart of Spotify's AI-driven products. You'll design how people talk with Spotify — the flows, the voice, the moment-to-moment interactions that make AI feel natural, useful, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of writing and system design. You'll bring sharp editorial instincts and real writing chops, but you'll spend your time designing how conversations work — not producing UI copy. Whether you come from editorial, linguistics, interaction design, or an engineering background with a strong feel for language, you'll have room to experiment, prototype, and define how the next generation of Spotify products talk back.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

* Design end-to-end conversational experiences — dialogue flows, turn-taking, state and context handling, error and recovery paths, and multi-turn interactions across Spotify's AI products.
* Engineer and refine the prompts that drive generative and conversational features, shaping model behavior to produce accurate, reliable, and useful outputs.
* Translate product requirements into conversational system design — identifying the capabilities (tools, data, actions, UI affordances) a system needs to fulfil user intent, and defining how the model interprets that intent, retains context, and decides what to do.
* Prototype with large language models to probe model behaviors, constraints, and failure modes, and turn what you learn into more capable experiences.
* Build evaluation frameworks to measure and improve conversation quality, accuracy, task completion, and user impact.
* Partner with product managers, engineers, researchers, designers, and the content design team to bring AI systems into cohesive, human-centered products.
* Define guardrails for safe, reliable model behavior across AI-driven interactions.
* Help raise the bar for conversation design craft on the team, guiding peers and contributing to shared patterns, evaluation methods, and documentation.


 Who you are
   

  

* Technically capable — comfortable working directly with LLMs and code, writing and running evaluations, using structured formats (JSON, YAML, Python), and diagnosing whether a failure is a prompt problem, a system design problem, or a missing capability.
* Practiced at testing and improving conversational systems or prompts through data, feedback, and experimentation.
* Energized by ambiguity, creativity, and the challenge of defining new interaction paradigms in a fast-moving AI landscape.
* A strong writer and editor with excellent editorial judgment, and a distinct feel for voice and character design — how a system's personality is expressed through prompting and behavior, not just word choice.
* A strong cross-functional collaborator who balances technical possibility with creative vision.
* Familiar with accessibility, localization, regulatory compliance, and safety in digital experiences.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Senior Product Manager, User Platform
description:
The Platform team creates the technology that enables Spotify to learn quickly and scale easily, enabling rapid growth in our users and our business around the globe. Spanning many disciplines, we work to make the business work; creating the infrastructure, tooling, frameworks, and capabilities needed to welcome a billion customers.
   

  

 User Platform owns Spotify's Consumer and Business Identity & Access Management (IAM) platform. Put simply, we're the front door to Spotify. We build the experiences and capabilities that enable people to securely access Spotify across consumer, creator, business and partner products while helping the rest of the company make trusted decisions using high-quality identity data.
   

  

 As Spotify continues to grow, our identity platform has evolved well beyond a traditional consumer account model. Today it supports consumers, creators, advertisers, employees, managed accounts, connected devices and emerging AI-powered experiences. We're looking for a Senior Product Manager to help shape the next generation of our User Platform strategy across account lifecycle management, IAM analytics, and device and client trust. This is a highly strategic platform role with direct impact on growth, safety, subscriptions, advertising, personalization, compliance and future product innovation.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Define the product strategy and roadmap for a portfolio of User Platform products spanning account lifecycle management, IAM analytics, and device and client intelligence.
* Partner closely with engineering managers, staff engineers, data scientists, analytics engineers, designers, researchers and insights teams to shape product direction and deliver long-term platform value.
* Collaborate across missions, studios and product areas to ensure Spotify's identity and user data platform evolves to meet business and customer needs.
* Help build Spotify's account lifecycle platform with well-defined account states, governed lifecycle transitions and comprehensive audit capabilities supporting Engineering, Customer Service, Legal and partner teams.
* Lead the product vision for User Intelligence, the shared platform that enables trusted understanding of users, devices and sessions through reusable signals and APIs.
* Partner with teams across User Fraud, Subscriptions, Advertising, Personalization, Safety, Legal and Platform to ensure trusted identity data becomes a strategic input for decision making.
* Translate complex identity, trust and data challenges into clear product strategies, business outcomes and prioritization decisions.
* Define success metrics including platform adoption, signal quality, data trust, lifecycle diagnosis time, decision latency and reduction of fragmented local solutions.
* Balance long-term platform investments with near-term business priorities, regulatory requirements and user experience.
* Foster an effective product operating rhythm across multiple squads by creating clarity, alignment and shared ownership that enables teams to move with confidence.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have significant product management experience building platform products, identity systems, infrastructure or large-scale consumer technology.
* You have experience working with backend platforms, APIs, distributed systems, identity platforms, policy engines or large-scale data products.
* You care deeply about creating trusted user experiences where security, privacy, safety and usability must work together.
* You use data to inform judgement, validate assumptions and make thoughtful product decisions while balancing qualitative insight with quantitative evidence.
* You enjoy solving complex, cross-functional problems where success depends on influence, collaboration and strong product thinking.
* You build trusted partnerships across Product, Engineering, Security, Legal, Data, Operations and business teams.
* You communicate highly technical concepts in a way that enables informed business decisions for both technical and non-technical audiences.
* You know how to build alignment across diverse stakeholders while maintaining focus on long-term product outcomes.
* You bring a structured, proactive approach and are comfortable creating clarity from complex and evolving challenges.
* You care about building platforms that enable teams to move faster while creating trusted experiences for millions of Spotify users around the world.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Our global benefits
   

  

* Extensive learning opportunities, through our dedicated team, GreenHouse.
* Flexible share incentives letting you choose how you share in our success.
* Global parental leave, six months off - for all new parents.
* All The Feels, our employee assistance program and self-care hub.
* Flexible public holidays, swap days off according to your values and beliefs.

title: Consent Manager – Personal Banking
description:
**Job Description**
**Consent Manager – Personal Banking**
 Join us in shaping how millions of customers engage with Danske Bank through meaningful and customer-centric consent journeys. Consent management is a key enabler in Danske Bank’s Forward’28 strategy and plays a central role in unlocking the potential of customer engagement, personalisation and service.
   

  

 We are looking for a Consent Manager to help shape and develop our consent agenda across Finland and Sweden and at the centre of Danske Bank's growth ambitions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Join an established journey where we are increasing our focus on consent management.
   

  

 As a Consent Manager, you will:
   

  

* Drive the development of a consistent and scalable consent framework across Finland and Sweden, balancing regulatory requirements with commercial opportunities and local market needs.
* Shape how we develop and manage consents, ensuring customer journeys are intuitive, customer-friendly and compliant while enabling business growth.
* Explore customer behaviour and identify opportunities to improve consent collection in customer engagement.
* Advise and support commercial teams across Personal Banking on consent management, development and tactical consent collection initiatives.
* Collaborate closely with colleagues from the Consent Management Programme as well as stakeholders across Legal, Compliance, Design, Communication, Technology and business teams throughout the bank.
* Translate regulatory requirements into customer-centric and commercially viable solutions.


 You will join the
 **Customer Experience, Insights & Sustainability PC** 
 team, a friendly and collaborative team of skilled colleagues. Together, we drive initiatives that improve customer experiences and support Personal Banking’s strategic ambitions. We are responsible for the bank’s customer experience framework, customer insights and measurements, complaints insights, selected sustainability initiatives and consent management.
   

  

 We aim to be customer-centric, data-driven and commercially oriented. The position offers a great opportunity for professional development, broad exposure across the organisation and the chance to influence strategic priorities across Personal Banking.
   

  

**Skills**
 To thrive in this role, we imagine you have a customer-focused mindset, experience working with digital customer journeys and an ability to navigate complexity while collaborating with a diverse group of stakeholders.
   

  

 We are looking for a colleague with the following qualifications:
   

  

* Experience working with consent management, data-driven customer engagement, privacy-related topics or similar customer and regulatory domains.
* A strong understanding of consent-related legislation and the ability to translate regulatory requirements into business opportunities and customer value.
* Experience working with digital customer journeys and customer-facing solutions.
* Strong communication skills in English and either Finnish or Swedish – or both!
* The ability to structure and drive initiatives across multiple domains, combined with experience managing projects, processes and stakeholders.
* Experience working with digital products, IT and/or user experience design is considered an advantage.
* A commercial mindset, with the ability to analyse opportunities, develop recommendations and balance customer value, growth ambitions, scalability and risk.


**We offer**
 We offer an inclusive and collaborative work environment where you will be challenged, empowered and given a high degree of responsibility.
   

  

 You will have the flexibility of working from home, although we expect you to be present in the office at least three days per week.
   

  

 The role offers:
   

  

* A unique opportunity to shape a strategic growth enabler within Danske Bank.
* Significant cross-functional exposure and collaboration with senior stakeholders.
* The opportunity to work at the intersection of customer experience, data, commercial development and regulation.
* A Nordic scope with responsibility across multiple markets.
* Strong opportunities for professional development and growth.


 Your colleagues in CX, Insights & Sustainability PC are located at Danske Bank’s headquarters next to Copenhagen Central Station. For this position, Copenhagen, Helsinki or Stockholm can be your primary location.
   

  

**Interested?**
 If this sounds like the right next step for you, please submit your application and CV at your earliest convenience. We review applications on an ongoing basis.
   

  

 Your job function (position) in the employment contract will be
 **Programme & Project Management** 
 .
   

  

 For more information, please contact Hiring Manager
 **Emilie Wedell-Wedellsborg** 
 at ewed@danskebank.dk.
   

  

 #SE #FI #DK

title: Security Analyst
description:
**Overview**
 At PayFast, we're looking for a creative and data-driven Content Strategist to lead the planning, development, and execution of content across digital platforms. In this role, you’ll shape the voice of our brand, craft compelling narratives, and align content efforts with business goals. You’ll collaborate with marketing, product, and design teams to deliver messaging that informs, engages, and converts.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a Content Strategist at PayFast, you’ll lead the development of clear, engaging, and purpose-driven content across all digital channels. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams to align content with business goals and brand voice
   

  

* Develop and manage a content strategy aligned with brand objectives best practices
* Improve user journeys through usability testing and feedback
* Analyze content performance and user engagement to optimize campaigns
* Ensure consistent tone, voice, and messaging across all platforms
* Respond to user inquiries via email and chat

**Qualifications**
 We’re looking for someone with at least 3 years of experience in content strategy, digital marketing, or copywriting. Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills are essential, along with a strategic mindset that balances creativity and performance.
   

  

**What We Offer**

* Flexible hybrid working model

* Professional development budget
