Till ansökan om anställning ska CV och personligt brev bifogas. Om du går vidare i anställningsprocessen ska alltid vidimerade kopior av betyg och intyg uppvisas. Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
description:
* Stockholm, Sverige
* Mid-level
* Mars 2026


**About Avidity**
 Avidity is a specialized software development company with offices in Berlin, Stockholm, and Porto Alegre, Brazil. Since 2012, we have helped IT companies build and operate reliable software systems.
   

  

 Our clients are primarily tech companies across industries such as edtech, digital signage, transportation and fintech. We support them with specialized expertise, join their teams to strengthen ongoing projects, or take full responsibility for delivering and operating complete systems.
   

  

 Alongside software development, we design and operate the infrastructure that runs our clients’ applications. Avidity’s infrastructure engineers work closely with developers to build secure, scalable, and reliable environments for modern cloud-based applications.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 We are looking for a Cloud Infrastructure Engineer to help design, operate, and continuously improve the environments that run our applications and those of our clients.
   

  

 In this role, you will work across the full lifecycle of our infrastructure: designing and implementing environments, maintaining and monitoring production systems, and improving developer workflows such as deployment and CI/CD pipelines. We work closely with development teams to ensure that applications run reliably, securely, and efficiently in production.
   

  

 You will work with Linux-based systems and modern infrastructure tooling to build and operate containerized applications and cloud environments. You will help automate infrastructure, improve observability and operational processes, and ensure that our systems meet high standards of reliability and security.
   

  

 You will have significant influence on how infrastructure is designed and operated for the systems you work on.
   

  

 Key Project: Secure Financial Infrastructure
   

  

 As part of this role, you will work on a platform developed for a client in the financial sector. The system is delivered as a complete service, where we are responsible for both the application and the infrastructure it runs on.
   

  

 The platform operates in a highly regulated environment and must meet strict requirements for security and compliance with financial regulations. It also integrates with external authorities and oversight systems, which places additional demands on operational reliability and traceability.
   

  

 You will contribute to the development and operation of the cloud infrastructure that supports the platform, helping ensure that it runs in a controlled and dependable environment suitable for critical financial services.
   

  

 This project offers the opportunity to work with infrastructure where security and accountability are foundational design considerations rather than later additions. The platform is built for long-term stability and predictable operations in a context where systems must withstand both operational demands and external scrutiny.
   

  

 What you’ll get to do
   

  

* Configure, administer, and automate Linux-based infrastructure
* Build and maintain automated deployment and integration pipelines
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and continuously improve production systems
* Design and operate high-availability infrastructure, including failover between datacenters
* Implement infrastructure automation and configuration management
* Ensure strong security practices, including secrets management, access control, and secure system configuration
* Design and maintain backup and disaster recovery strategies
* Work closely with developers to diagnose and resolve issues in production environments


 Core Technologies
   

  

* Kubernetes
* OpenStack
* Docker
* Ansible
* Git
* CI/CD systems such as GitHub Actions or Jenkins
* Nginx
* Let’s Encrypt
* PostgreSQL
* Microsoft SQL Server
* Cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure


 To succeed in this role, we believe that you
   

  

* Have strong Linux knowledge and are comfortable operating production systems
* Have experience designing and operating infrastructure for modern applications
* Are familiar with container orchestration platforms such as Kubernetes
* Have experience with OpenStack environments (a plus)
* Enjoy automating infrastructure and operational processes
* Have a strong awareness of security best practices in infrastructure and operations
* Are comfortable working with cloud platforms, regardless of provider
* Understand the importance of reliability, redundancy, and failover in production environments
* Collaborate well with developers and enjoy solving operational challenges together
* Are fluent in Swedish and English


 Working at Avidity
   

  

 At Avidity, you will work closely with developers and infrastructure specialists across our offices in Berlin, Stockholm, and Porto Alegre. We value collaboration, knowledge sharing, and taking ownership of the systems we build and operate.
   

  

 We offer a flexible work environment that combines remote work with time at our Stockholm office. Our engineers are used to working across locations and time zones, and we emphasize clear communication and trust.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who wants to grow with Avidity in Sweden and contribute to building reliable infrastructure for long-term client projects. Many of our engagements are long-running, allowing us to take real ownership of the systems we design and operate.

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
Mission
   

  

 As
 **Customer Success Manager,** 
 you are responsible for a portfolio of our most critical customers within the service scope. You ensure that services are delivered according to expectations, that customers achieve their intended outcomes, and that strong, long-term relationships are maintained.
   

  

 You manage the
 **full customer lifecycle** 
 from onboarding and adoption to expansion and renewal, driving usage, securing renewals, identifying opportunities for additional value, and minimizing churn.
 **You work closely with Sales, Service teams, and technical experts** 
 , acting as the
 **main point of contact** 
 and accountability for your customers. The role directly impacts
 **customer satisfaction** 
 ,
 **retention** 
 , and continued business with k
 **ey accounts** 
 .
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Customer Ownership and Service Delivery
   

  

* Act as the primary point of accountability for a portfolio of strategic customers and build strong relationships with stakeholders
* Ensure consistent, high-quality customer experience while delivering internal commitments according to contract and expectations
* Monitor service performance, usage, and issue trends, and ensure timely follow-up on product support and customer issues


 Customer Outcomes and Lifecycle (Adopt - Expand - Renew)
   

  

* Define customer objectives and success plans, and support onboarding and usage to accelerate time to value
* Drive adoption and ensure expected customer outcomes are achieved
* Identify expansion opportunities cross sell upsell and manage renewals to limit churn


 Commercial Contribution Data and Continuous Improvement
   

  

* Identify pull through opportunities with Connected Service Hub experts and support opportunity follow up with Sales
* Provide customer updates data insights and performance trends including regular reviews
* Build and track customer health metrics ensure data quality and share feedback to improve services and customer experience


 What do you need to succeed?
   

  

* Experience in Customer Success or Service Delivery roles
* Knowledge of medium and high voltage environments and experience working with large and critical electro-intensive customers, combined with understanding of digital services, IoT or cloud-based environments
* Strong analytical skills with experience in tools such as Salesforce and Excel
* Excellent relationship-building skills and ability to manage multiple stakeholders
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering or science preferred
* Fluent in English and Swedish


 What's in it for you:
   

  

* Opportunity to shape the digital transformation journey of global clients
* Dynamic work environment with exposure to cutting-edge marketing technologies
* Career growth in an evolving digital landscape
* Ability to manage strategic relationships with diverse international clients
* Development of expertise in advanced analytics and customer success strategies


**Let us learn about you! Apply today.**
**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €40 billion global revenue
   

  

 +9% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Head of Customer Service
description:
Är du en trygg och tydlig ledare som vill kombinera stabil leverans med utveckling, och som drivs av att skapa kundvärde? Som Head of Customer Service hos GS1 Sweden får du möjligheten att leda ett kompetent team i en organisation, där data möter tydlig affärsnytta i hjärtat av det globala varuflödet.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Visste du att du möter GS1 varje dag, ofta utan att tänka på det? Det är nämligen GS1 som står bakom den vanliga streckkoden som finns på nästan alla världens konsumentprodukter. GS1 ser till att hela världen talar samma språk genom standardisering och digitalisering av produktdata vilket möjliggör effektivare globala varuflöden, bättre kvalitet på produktinformation och transparens för konsumenter.
 



  





 Nu söker GS1 Sweden en Head of Customer Service med syfte att taktiskt och operativt ansvara för leverans och kvalitet i sin kundservice. Du får en central roll i att säkra kvalitet i leveransen här och nu, samtidigt som du driver förbättringar baserade på kundinsikter, KPI:er och smarta arbetssätt – där teknik och människa möts i en modern kundservice.
 



  





 GS1 Swedens kundservice hanterar en bred variation av ärenden, från frågor kring fakturering, avtal och administration till mer tekniska och komplexa frågeställningar kopplade till GS1 standarder, deras tjänster, datakvalitet och hur standarderna används bäst i kundernas verksamheter. Det ställer höga krav på struktur, viljan att lära nytt, och lära ut samt förmågan att skapa en kundupplevelse som kombinerar service, rådgivning och specialistkunskap.
 



  





**Vad GS1 erbjuder** 



* En roll med tydligt mandat och stor påverkan: du leder och utvecklar en kundservicefunktion som är avgörande för kundvärde, kvalitet och GS1 Swedens fortsatta utveckling.
* Kombinationen av stabilitet och utveckling: du får driva förbättringar som gör skillnad här och nu, samtidigt som du bygger arbetssätt för framtiden.
* Tvärfunktionell och modern miljö: nära samarbete med kollegor inom verksamheten, IT och AI – och stor möjlighet att påverka hur tekniken i kombination med medarbetarnas expertis används för att höja kvalitet och kundupplevelse.
* En varm och professionell kultur: en organisation som värnar samarbete, lärande och ett hållbart arbetsliv, med attraktiva villkor och förmåner.



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 




 I rollen ansvarar du för att GS1 Sweden levererar kundservice med hög kvalitet, god tillgänglighet och tydliga resultat. Du leder teamet genom både vardagens operativa leverans och den långsiktiga utvecklingen av kundupplevelsen mot en kundservice i världsklass.
 



  





**Ditt uppdrag innebär bland annat att:** 



* Säkra stabil leverans och hög kvalitet i alla kanaler (telefon, mejl, onboarding/utbildning, teknisk support och ärendehantering) – med tydlig uppföljning och struktur.
* Ansvara för bemanning, kapacitet och daglig styrning, inklusive arbetssätt som möjliggör både leverans och kompetensutveckling i teamet.
* Följa upp och driva förbättring mot gemensamma KPI:er såsom NKI, svarstider och produktivitet – med ambitionen att fortsätta stärka redan höga nivåer och driva utveckling mot nästa mål.
* Leda och utveckla ett team på 14 personer (inklusive medarbetare på distans) med fokus på tydlighet, tillit, och coachande ledarskap.
* Omsätta kundinsikter till konkreta prioriteringar och synliggöra kundperspektivet brett i organisationen – du bygger broar mellan kundservice och övriga funktioner.
* Driva utveckling av arbetssätt, processer och kompetens för att skapa en kundservice som både är stabil i drift och utvecklingsorienterad över tid.
* Bidra till utvecklingen av “tech with touch” – hur AI och ny teknik kan stödja medarbetare i kundmötet och hjälpa teamet att identifiera pain-points och förbättringsområden.



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Vi söker dig som motiveras av en roll med stor påverkan. Du ser fram emot att leda ett drivet team där din roll är att sprida trygghet och möjliggöra att alla i teamet kan vara sitt bästa jag. Du skapar förtroende genom närvaro och struktur, och du är skicklig på att balansera stabilitet och förändring.
 



  





 Du har en naturlig förmåga att identifiera nya möjligheter och har det engagemang som krävs för att driva dina frågor tvärfunktionellt i organisationen. Här får du en roll med stort utrymme att växa, i en miljö som präglas av kundfokus, framåtanda och professionalism, och där det mänskliga mötet och den omtänksamma kulturen får stå i centrum.
 



  





**Vi ser att du har:** 



* Flerårig erfarenhet av att leda kundserviceteam med personalansvar.
* Erfarenhet av att driva förändring och förbättringsarbete (t.ex. kvalitet, arbetssätt, kundupplevelse/KPI:er).
* Bakgrund inom teknisk support/IT-nära kundservice.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i eller leda distribuerade team.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.
* Meriterande: branscherfarenhet från retail, dagligvaruhandel eller logistik.


- 


 Vi kommer värdera potential och personlighet framför erfarenhet i denna rekrytering så tveka inte att söka tjänsten även om du inte uppfyller alla krav på listan.
 



  





**Om GS1 Sweden** 




 Idag använder mer än två miljoner företag globalt GS1s standarder. Vissa branscher använder flera av våra standarder och tjänster och har kommit längre på sin resa att utveckla ett digitalt affärsspråk. I Sverige har dagligvarubranschen kommit långt men vi jobbar även aktivt med foodservice, bygg, detaljhandeln, apotek, sjukvård, transport- och logistik. Idag har vi fler än 15 000 kunder.
 



  





 GS1 Sweden är not-for-profit och för att leverera kundnytta arbetar vi tillsammans med våra användare. Det vi gör, gör vi utifrån våra kunders behov och efterfrågan. All utveckling och underhåll av GS1:s standarder och tjänster sker tillsammans med våra användare. Våra användargrupper är öppna för alla kunder och alla våra standarder är branschneutrala.
 



  





 Vi är cirka 90 anställda, alla med olika kompetens och bakgrund. Vi håller till på vårt moderna kontor mitt i centrala Stockholm och i vår studio i Hammarby Sjöstad. Våra medarbetare tar ofta initiativ till roliga aktiviteter på, och efter jobbet. Vad sägs om lunchlöpning, hälsosatsningar, AW:s eller varför inte ta en kort paus i vår återhämtningsfåtölj? Mer information finns på jobb.gs1. gs1.se eller LinkedIn.
 



  





**Placering:** 
 Kontor i centrala Stockholm. Rapportering: Du rapporterar till Elin Cedwall, Chief Commercial Officer
 



  





 Vill du veta mer? I denna rekrytering samarbetar GS1 med Winona. Vid frågor är du välkommen att kontakta ansvariga rekryteringskonsulter Charlotte Runsbech på charlotte.runsbech@winonagroup.com, Emeli Bergenhag på emeli.bergenhag@winonagroup.com eller ansvarig Researcher Liisa.unenge@winonagroup.com

title: Project Manager
description:
Insight Enterprises is a Fortune 500 Solutions Integrator helping organizations accelerate transformation by unlocking the power of people and technology.
   

  

 With a 35-year foundation in hardware and software supply chain augmenting our deep expertise in cloud, data, AI, cybersecurity, and intelligent edge, we guide organizations through complex digital decisions to achieve extraordinary results.
   

  

 We are looking for a Project Manager to join our EMEA Services Delivery function within the Project Management Office (PMO). You will be responsible for managing small to medium-sized projects across the Microsoft technology stack, ensuring successful delivery for our clients in Sweden and across the region.
   

  

 You will lead projects end-to-end, working closely with internal teams, partners and client stakeholders to deliver to scope, schedule, budget and quality targets. This role is ideal for a mid-level project manager who can work independently, is comfortable managing multiple projects concurrently, and enjoys working in a dynamic, client-facing environment.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, we would be keen to hear from you.
   

  

***This is a hybrid role. You will be expected to spend three days per week on-site with clients or at an Insight office, with the remaining time worked remotely.***
 Key responsibilities:
   

  

* Deliver end-to-end projects (small to medium in size) in line with Insight methodologies, processes and best practices.
* Manage project scope, schedule, budget, risks, issues, dependencies and quality throughout the full project lifecycle.
* Lead and coordinate project teams, including internal resources and subcontractors, ensuring clear roles, responsibilities and expectations.
* Manage multiple concurrent projects with durations ranging from one month to a year, depending on complexity.
* Plan and run project activities such as kick-off meetings, status updates, steering meetings and formal reviews.
* Prepare and maintain comprehensive project documentation, plans, reports and governance artefacts.
* Monitor and report on project performance, ensuring accurate and timely updates in project management systems and tools.
* Execute change control processes, working closely with leadership when required.
* Ensure projects are delivered to agreed gross profit and revenue targets.
* Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships with clients, achieving high levels of satisfaction through clear, consistent communication.
* Identify and escalate risks and issues promptly, proposing and implementing mitigations.
* Support presales activity when required, including scoping, planning, and estimating new engagements.
* Contribute to continuous improvement, identifying ways to enhance project delivery efficiency and quality.


 Key skills and experience required:
   

  

* Proven experience as a Project Manager delivering IT projects, ideally within services, consulting or systems integration environments.
* Strong knowledge and practical experience of project management methodologies; PRINCE2 (or equivalent) is highly desirable.
* Experience with the Microsoft technology stack, particularly Azure and Microsoft 365; familiarity with broader Microsoft solutions is an advantage.
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously, balancing priorities and deadlines effectively.
* Strong financial awareness and experience managing project budgets, costs and forecasts.
* Excellent stakeholder management skills, with the confidence to engage and influence at different levels within client organisations.
* High level of organisation, attention to detail and problem-solving ability.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce clear documentation and deliver concise status reporting.
* Experience working with or within the Swedish public sector is highly desirable; experience in financial services, retail or other commercial sectors is an advantage.
* Comfortable working both independently and as part of a virtual, geographically distributed team.


**About Insight:**
 We believe that by giving you the freedom to think big and empower you to reach your full potential, together we will achieve the best outcomes. Along with excellent benefits and a compelling reward package, we offer the opportunity to work in a supportive environment with a high level of autonomy and creativity - there’s a reason our average employee tenure is over 6 years.
   

  

 We strive to display our three core values of Hunger, Heart, and Harmony every day. They represent and drive who we are here at Insight and by doing so we are doing amazing things. Insight started in a garage in 1988, and it is through harnessing our three core values that two brothers, Eric and Tim Crown, steered Insight to the Fortune 500 company it is today. We are now a Global IT Services and Solutions business, enthusiastic about helping customers and the real people who sit behind them.
   

  

**Application Details:**
 Insight is an equal opportunity employer, and we are committed to achieving diversity and equality within our organisation. We seek out people from diverse backgrounds and encourage you to apply.
   

  

 We will endeavour to contact you within five business days, should we feel your profile is a good match for this role. If you do not hear from us within this time, please presume that on this occasion, your application was not successful.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Om rollen**
 Nu söker vi dig som har erfarenhet inom maskininlärning! Att vara anställd på B3 innebär att du hjälper våra kunder i deras utvecklingsprojekt och dagliga utmaningar. Vi ser gärna att du har vana att arbeta såväl självständigt som kundnära och är van vid ett agilt teambaserat arbetssätt.
   

  

**Vi letar efter dig som har:**
* Minst 5 års dokumenterad arbetserfarenhet inom maskininlärning eller liknande område
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och implementera maskininlärningsmodeller
* Gedigen erfarenhet inom minst ett programmeringsspråk (te.x. Python, Scala eller R)
* Erfarenhet av SQL och databashantering
* Erfarenhet av dataanalys- och visualiseringsverktyg så som Pandas, Matplotlib
* Kunskap om maskininlärningsbibliotek som TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn
* Behärskar god svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Vad vi erbjuder:**
 Att vi trivs tillsammans på B3 är otroligt viktigt. Anledningen till att många börjar hos oss är bland annat det stora fokuset på
 **kompetensutveckling** 
 , där vi kontinuerligt delar kunskap med varandra och uppmuntrar till kompetensutveckling och certifieringar. Vi erbjuder bland annat:
   

  

* Generös kompetensutveckling
* Attraktiv lönemodell
* En fantastisk wellness- och medarbetarsatsning


**Om B3**
 B3 är en börsnoterad koncern och trygg arbetsgivare med hög medarbetarnöjdhet. B3 har ca 1000 medarbetare inom många olika expertområden. B3 är rankad som Sveriges tredje bästa arbetsplats 2021 av Great Place to Work, utsett till Sveriges IT Karriärföretag 2022 och 2023, samt vann utmärkelsen Årets Karriärföretag 2022. Vi lever efter våra värdeord erfarenhet, olikheter och energi samt satsar på hållbarhet i alla led. Vi tror att medarbetare som mår bra presterar bättre och har därför B3 Team som anordnar aktiviteter inom wellness, från yoga och löpning till musikquiz och föreläsningar om stresshantering och mental hälsa.
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan redan idag!**
 Har du frågor om tjänsten? Tveka inte att kontakta rekryteringsansvarig, Lidia Hagos, för denna tjänst på lidia.hagos@b3.se.

title: Sr. Solutions Engineer
description:
REQ# FEQ427R34
   

  

 At Databricks, our core principles are at the heart of everything we do; creating a culture of proactiveness and a customer-centric mindset guides us to create a unified platform that makes data science and analytics accessible to everyone. We aim to inspire our customers to make informed decisions that push their business forward. We provide a user-friendly and intuitive platform that makes it easy to turn insights into action and fosters a culture of creativity, experimentation, and continuous improvement. You will be an essential part of this mission, using your technical expertise to demonstrate how our Data Intelligence Platform can help customers solve their complex data challenges. You'll work with a collaborative, customer-focused team who values innovation and creativity, using your skills to create customized solutions to help our customers achieve their goals and guide their businesses forward. Join us in our quest to change how people work with data and make a better world!
   

  

**The Impact You Will Have**
* Form successful relationships with clients throughout your assigned territory to provide technical and business value in collaboration with an Account Executive and a Senior Solutions Architect.
* Gain excitement from clients about Databricks through hands-on evaluation and Spark programming, integrating with the wider cloud ecosystem and 3rd party applications.
* Contribute to building the Databricks technical community through engagement at workshops, seminars, and meet-ups.
* Become a Big Data Analytics advisor on aspects of architecture and design.
* Support your customers by authoring reference architectures, how-tos, and demo applications.
* Develop both technically and in the pre-sales aspect with the goal of becoming an independently operating Solutions Architect.


**What We Look For**
 Familiarity working with clients, creating a narrative, answering customer questions, aligning the agenda with important interests, and achieving tangible outcomes.Ability to independently deliver a technical proposition, identify customers' pain-points, and explain important areas for business value to develop a trusted advisor skillset.
   

  

* Code in a core programming language such as Python


 Knowledgeable in a core Big Data Analytics domain with some exposure to advanced proofs-of-concept and an understanding of a major public cloud platform.
   

  

* Experience diving deeper into solution architecture and Data Engineering.


**About Databricks**
 Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Comcast, Condé Nast, Grammarly, and over 50% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to unify and democratize data, analytics and AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake and MLflow. To learn more, follow Databricks on Twitter, LinkedIn and Facebook.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Databricks, we strive to provide comprehensive benefits and perks that meet the needs of all of our employees. For specific details on the benefits offered in your region click here.
   

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At Databricks, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive culture where everyone can excel. We take great care to ensure that our hiring practices are inclusive and meet equal employment opportunity standards. Individuals looking for employment at Databricks are considered without regard to age, color, disability, ethnicity, family or marital status, gender identity or expression, language, national origin, physical and mental ability, political affiliation, race, religion, sexual orientation, socio-economic status, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.
   

  

**Compliance**
**If access to export-controlled technology or source code is required for performance of job duties, it is within Employer's discretion whether to apply for a U.S. government license for such positions, and Employer may decline to proceed with an applicant on this basis alone.**

title: Weekend Support Agent (Part-time)
description:
**Who We Are 🚚**
 Airmee is a rapidly scaling last-mile logistics platform, backed by Bonnier Capital and other leading investors.
   

  

 We were founded to build the best and most sustainable delivery experience on the market. Today, we are Sweden’s largest player in home deliveries and one of the few last-mile companies combining strong growth with profitability.
   

  

 In 2024, we reached SEK 362M in revenue, and in 2025 surpassed SEK 600M - driven by a tech-enabled, asset-light platform where routing, automation, and real-time operational control generate significant efficiencies. We’re now entering our next chapter: scaling smarter, strengthening our operational engine, and continuing to raise the standard for last-mile logistics in the Nordics.
   

  

**What You'll Do 🎯**
 ⬥Handle incoming errands across channels — resolving customer and courier issues quickly, clearly, and accurately.
   

  

 ⬥Support retailers, customers and couriers, making sure deliveries run smoothly from pickup to doorstep.
   

  

 ⬥Own each ticket end-to-end: investigate, communicate, and follow up until it's fully resolved.
   

  

 ⬥Stay calm and structured through peak volumes and shifting priorities.
   

  

 ⬥Spot recurring issues and patterns, and flag them so we fix root causes — not just symptoms.
   

  

**Who You Are ⚡**
 ⬥
 **Service-minded:** 
 you put the customer's need first and genuinely want to help.
   

  

 ⬥
 **Calm under pressure:** 
 you juggle several cases at once without dropping quality.
   

  

 ⬥
 **Self-driven but collaborative:** 
 you take initiative and lift the team around you.
   

  

 ⬥
 **Solution-oriented:** 
 you see possibilities instead of obstacles.
   

  

 ⬥
 **Curious and adaptable:** 
 you're comfortable with routines that change weekly — sometimes daily.
   

  

 ⬥
 **A strong communicator:** 
 clear and professional in both Swedish and English.
   

  

**Qualifications ✅**
 ⬥Experience from customer service or a similar service-oriented role.
   

  

 ⬥Fluent in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.
   

  

 ⬥Familiarity with Intercom and IT-related cases is a plus.
   

  

 ⬥Able to commit to a two-week full-time onboarding before moving onto weekend shifts.
   

  

****Practicalities 📍****
**Department:** 
 Support
   

  

**Reports to:** 
 Support Manager
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm (On-site)
   

  

**Schedule:** 
 Part-time, weekends — Saturday & Sunday, 14:30–23:00
   

  

**Onboarding:** 
 Two weeks full-time, Monday–Friday (08:00–16:30 or 14:30–23:00)

title: Business Developer
description:
**S A L E S S P E C I A L I S T**
*B u s i n e s s D e v e l o p m e n t*
**\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_**
 Full-time | Permanent | Stockholm/Goteborg
   

  

**A B O U T X E N I T**
 Xenit is a growth company which specializes in Cloud and modern work. Our committed employees inspire, challenge and encourage each other, while providing extensive value for our customers.
   

  

**W H A T W E N E E D 🙏🏻**
 As a sales specialist with a focus on business development, you will be the person who opens the door to our future customers. You will chase new business, build relationships from the first hello and take customers all the way to a signed agreement.
   

  

 This is a role for you if you are a person who loves turning something cold into a warm, long-lasting relationship 🔥 If you love to learn about your employer (company industry, its way of working, its values and goals) and then demonstrate the business value of the company (and its technical consultants) to a customer, then we want to speak to you!
   

  

 You will work closely with a team of driven colleagues in sales, marketing and service delivery, and will have our CCO as a sounding board and coach in the big deals. With us, the path from idea to action is short; if you have a good idea, we test it.
   

  

**Examples Of Potential Tasks**
* Identifying and processing new & exciting prospects via phone, email, LinkedIn and events
* Receiving and qualifying leads from our marketing and partner team
* Booking and running first meetings with decision-makers and getting them curious about Xenit
* Driving deals from first contact, to quote and closing
* Keeping your pipeline clean and up to date in our CRM system and encouraging the team at our joint sales meetings
* Handing over new customers to our account managers and remaining a reliable contact until the relationship is solid


**C O U L D Y O U B E A M A T C H ?**
**We Believe Our Next Business Developer Has**
* A solid few years of experience in B2B sales and proven experience in chasing new deals
* Skills in relationship building - someone who is not afraid to pick up the phone and make the first contact
* A genuine interest in IT (Cloud, Modern Work, Data & Analytics)
* A structured and organised approach, so that the sales process works seamlessly
* The ability to drive your own business independently, but also work well in a team


**It Is a Bonus If You Have**
* A history of working in IT organisations (understanding sales/business development within the cloud, modern work or data sectors)
* A background working in consulting organisations


**We Also Believe That You Are a Person Who**
* Acts on their own initiative, makes things happen and takes responsibility for their work
* Has a "fire in their belly" or a passion for what they do every day
* Collaborates effectively with others and builds good relationships with both customers and colleagues
* Enjoys sharing knowledge and experiences in order to support colleagues in reaching common goals
* Fluent in spoken and written Swedish and English
* Above all else, displays kindness and compassion in everything they do 💕


**W H Y C H O O S E X E N I T ?**
**Benefits 🎁**
 Xenit boasts a large benefits package, read full list here.
   

  

**Super interesting colleagues 🎉**
 With us you will find spinning instructors, parkour practitioners, gamers, art historians, rugby players, puzzle maniacs, film geeks and much more.
   

  

 With us, you are free to be who you are. Our workforce is so diverse, that one of the only things each person has in common is an incredible drive and passion for what they do.
   

  

**Activities ⛹🏻**
 Each quarter, we host
 **Xenit Inspire** 
 where employees are able to share specialist knowledge, information about cool projects, and take part in tasks centered around innovation - workshops and hackathons. We also offer annual conferences, team building, after works, and "Bring a Buddy" lunches at the office.
   

  

 In 2024 and 2025 Xenit was recognised as a
 **"Career Company"** 
 . This prestigious acknowledgement underscores our commitment to fostering a workplace culture that values inclusivity, well-being, and growth.
   

  

*"Xenit is an outstanding employer where corporate culture and well-being are at the center. Here, the employees are part of a warm and inclusive community where their well-being and well-being are prioritized. By offering an environment where collaboration, creativity and innovation are encouraged, employees can thrive and develop while contributing to the company's success."*
**Read more about Karriar Företagen** 
**here** 
**.**
 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

  

*Application information may be shared, in some instances, within the co-native group.*
 If you have questions about the position or the recruitment process, you are welcome to contact our Head of Talent: Abigail Chapman 💌
   

  

 Read more here: https://xenit.se/
   

  

 Xenit's goal is not only to become Sweden's leading cloud partner, but to be Sweden's kindest cloud partner.
   

  

 Our theory is that satisfied workers produce satisfying work, and so we aim to create a working environment in which our employees can thrive - working independently, flexibly and happily.
   

  

 We are happy with hybrid remote working, encourage collaboration between offices and freedom in choosing devices/equipment & working hours.
   

  

 Why not find out more about us?

title: SAP Data Migration Lead
description:
**About the Company** 




  





  





 We are a leading global technology company committed to innovation and excellence. Our mission is to empower businesses through cutting-edge solutions and a collaborative culture that values diversity and inclusion.
 



  





  





**About the Role** 




  





  





 The SAP Master Data Lead will play a critical role in the Transformation S4Hana program, overseeing the management and governance of master data across the organization.
 



  





  





**Responsibilities** 




  





  




* Lead the master data management strategy and implementation for the S4Hana program.
* Ensure data quality and integrity across all master data domains.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define data governance policies.
* Provide training and support to users on master data processes.
* Monitor and report on master data performance metrics.



  





  





**Qualifications** 




  





  




* Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Business Administration, or a related field.
* 5+ years of experience in master data management or related roles.



  





  





**Required Skills** 




  





  




* Strong understanding of SAP S4Hana and master data management principles.
* Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.



  





  





**Preferred Skills** 




  





  




* Experience with data governance frameworks.
* Knowledge of data migration processes.
* Familiarity with data visualization tools.



  





  





**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




  





  





 We are an equal opportunity employer and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals regardless of race, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
G+D makes the lives of billions of people around the world more secure. We shape trust in the digital age with built-in security tech in three segments: Digital Security, Financial Platforms and Currency Technology. We have been a reliable partner for our customers for over 170 years with our innovative solutions for SecurityTech! We are an international technology group and traditional family business with over 14,000 employees in 40 countries. Creating Confidence is our path to success. Trust is the basis of our collaboration within G+D.
   

  

 We are the reliable partner for all challenges resulting from the Internet of Things. We offer a complete connectivity portfolio for mobile network operators, automotive manufacturers, technology companies such as chip and module manufacturers as well as transport and logistics providers. Our portfolio includes highly secure solutions in the area of connectivity & IoT, from classic SIM, eSIM and iSIM, to the associated embedded operating systems and life cycle management, through to services for global connectivity and IoT solutions. Do you want to actively shape the digital transformation with us?
   

  

 If you are passionate about cloud technologies, automation, platform engineering, and helping teams deliver better solutions faster, we would love to hear from you. Bring your expertise, leadership, and continuous-improvement mindset to help us build the next generation of our cloud platform and DevOps capabilities.
 **Giesecke+Devrient** 
 (GD) specializes in securing mobile connections, legal identities, and digital infrastructures. When it comes to digital security, we serve as the trusted partner for governments, public authorities, and enterprises globally. We safeguard and manage confidential systems, networks, data, and identities in physical, digital and mobile environments. We are now looking for an experienced and proactive
 **DevOps Engineer** 
 to join our team and play a key role in building, maintaining, and evolving our cloud platform and delivery capabilities.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This role is ideal for someone who combines strong technical expertise with excellent communication skills and enjoys driving continuous improvement across processes, tools, and ways of working. You will work closely with development teams, product owners, security stakeholders, and other technical teams to ensure reliable, scalable, and efficient solutions in Azure. Key responsibilities
   

  

* Design, deploy, and maintain software services and cloud-native solutions in Microsoft Azure
* Develop and optimize CI/CD pipelines to enable efficient and reliable software delivery
* Automate infrastructure, operational processes, and deployment workflows
* Manage and support containerized environments and cloud infrastructure
* Implement and maintain monitoring, logging, and observability solutions
* Collaborate closely with development teams throughout the application lifecycle
* Act as a trusted technical advisor and help guide the team through complex challenges
* Translate technical concepts into clear and understandable business language for stakeholders, product owners, and other teams


 Participation in an on-call rotation may become part of the role in the future. While this is not currently decided, candidates should be comfortable with the possibility of taking part in an on-call support arrangement at a later stage.
   

  

**Required Skills & Experience**
 We are looking for someone who is not only technically strong but also capable of creating clarity, building trust, and helping teams grow. Someone that takes ownership of their work while maintaining a broad perspective on the overall platform and team objectives.Furthermore, you have professional proficiency in English, proven experience in designing, deploying, and managing software services and cloud-based solutions in Microsoft Azure as well as hands-on experience with modern DevOps practices, including automation, deployment pipelines, and infrastructure management in Azure environments. Technical skills:
   

  

* Strong hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure
* Experience deploying, building, and managing software services in Azure environments
* Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices
* Experience with Docker and containerized applications
* Strong focus on automation and infrastructure management
* Experience with Terraform and/or Ansible
* Understanding of the Java application lifecycle and related deployment processes
* Interest in, and practical use of, AI-powered tools to improve productivity, automation, and engineering workflows


 If you have a degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field it will be advantageous. Candidates without a formal degree are equally welcome to apply if they can demonstrate substantial and relevant professional experience.Fluent Swedish is highly desirable and considered a strong advantage as well as experience with one or more of the following technologies: Go, Python, AWS, Kubernetes, Keyloak, Grafana, Prometheus and Splunk.
   

  

**What’s next?**
 We look forward to getting to know you better! Welcome with your application no later than
 **August 9th, 2026.**
**Why G+D?**
 At G+D, you’re not just joining a company, you’re joining a diverse, supportive, and purpose‑driven community. In this role you will have the opportunity to work with talented people in an international and innovative environment. G+D is a well-established family-owned company at the forefront of the market.Besides a dynamic and evolving industry, we offer you:
   

  

* A culture that values trust, innovation, and continuous learning
* Personal and professional development with a wide range of training and learning opportunities
* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Work-life balance with a hybrid work model with a requirement to be in the office at least two days per week
* The chance to make a real impact on secure digital ecosystems


**Get to know us and our team at G+D Sweden better by listening to our Job cast below:**
 Shaping the next chapter of the digital ageSpotify: https://open.spotify.com/episode/71GyhbDv090LgVyukyLf7v?si=f399b1f0d93e47e3
   

  

 Acast: https://shows.acast.com/5cdc00c69e126b7939fb506b/646e072f95211700118d82a4 Our DNA is in our peopleSpotify: https://open.spotify.com/episode/6BpWiUCMXr3q68dSGEr2w7?si=e4328a3c8db34b8d
   

  

 Acast: https://shows.acast.com/5cdc00c69e126b7939fb506b/646e070580b8d100110f0e95

title: Talent Acquisition Partner / Sourcer –  Konsultmatchare
description:
**För dig som tror på din egen förmåga – och vill få betalt därefter.**
 Alla söker rekryterare.
   

  

 Vi söker någon som redan vet hur man hittar rätt kandidater, bygger relationer och skapar resultat.
   

  

 Hos WeQuel får du inte bara ett jobb, du får möjligheten att vara med och bygga ett snabbväxande konsultbolag där prestation, engagemang och affärsmannaskap värderas högre än långa hierarkier och titlar.
   

  

 Vi tror på människor som vill ta ansvar, göra skillnad och själva påverka hur långt de kan gå.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vi söker en Talent Acquisition Partner / Sourcer som vill arbeta med rekrytering av konsulter inom
 **Life Science, Engineering och IT** 
 .
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta nära våra konsultchefer och ledning med fokus på att hitta rätt kandidater till våra uppdrag och bygga upp ett starkt nätverk inför framtida affärer.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Identifiera och attrahera kvalificerade kandidater.
* Search och sourcing via LinkedIn Recruiter, databaser och egna nätverk.
* Bygga långsiktiga relationer med kandidater.
* Presentera kandidater till våra konsultchefer och kunder.
* Bygga upp en stark kandidatpipeline inför kommande uppdrag.
* Bidra med idéer och förbättringar kring rekrytering, sourcing och employer branding.


 Vi arbetar i ett högt tempo och får löpande förfrågningar från både nya och befintliga kunder. Därför söker vi någon som kan vara med och skapa värde från dag ett.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Den här rollen passar
 **inte** 
 dig som söker ditt första jobb inom rekrytering.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som redan har erfarenhet av exempelvis:
   

  

* Talent Acquisition
* Rekrytering
* Sourcing / Search
* Bemanning eller konsultbranschen
* Kandidatansvar eller liknande roller


 Du behöver inte ha många års erfarenhet, men du ska känna dig trygg i att hitta kandidater, skapa relationer och driva ditt eget arbete.
   

  

 Har du dessutom ett eget nätverk inom någon av våra branscher är det ett stort plus.
   

  

 Vi tror att du är:
   

  

* Affärsdriven
* Självgående
* Resultatorienterad
* Relationsskapande
* Initiativtagande
* Entreprenöriell


 Du motiveras av att skapa resultat och ser möjligheter där andra ser hinder.
   

  

**Ersättningsmodell**
 Den här rollen passar dig som tror på din egen förmåga.
   

  

 Rollen inleds med en
 **100 % provisionsbaserad ersättningsmodell** 
 under en inledande testperiod där vi tillsammans utvärderar samarbetet.
   

  

 För rätt person finns mycket goda möjligheter att snabbt utveckla både rollen och ersättningsmodellen.
   

  

 Om du visar resultat är vi öppna för att tillsammans ta fram en långsiktig modell som kan inkludera exempelvis:
   

  

* Fast grundlön kombinerad med hög provision.
* Högre provisionsnivåer.
* Bonus kopplad till prestation.
* Större affärsansvar.


 Vi tror inte på standardlösningar, vi tror på att belöna människor som skapar värde.
   

  

**Hos oss får du möjlighet att växa**
 Vi bygger långsiktigt och letar efter människor som vill växa tillsammans med oss.
   

  

 Visar du resultat finns möjligheter att utvecklas vidare inom bolaget, exempelvis som:
   

  

* Konsultchef
* Team Lead
* Head of Talent Acquisition
* Head of Sales
* Affärsutveckling
* Andra nyckelroller i takt med att bolaget fortsätter växa


 Hos oss finns inga långa beslutsvägar eller stelbenta hierarkier. Bra idéer uppskattas och personer som tar ansvar får också möjlighet att påverka.
   

  

**Varför WeQuel?**
 Vi är ett entreprenörsdrivet konsultbolag med höga ambitioner och korta beslutsvägar.
   

  

 Hos oss får du:
   

  

* Vara med och bygga ett bolag med stora ambitioner.
* Arbeta nära grundarna och ledningen.
* Stor frihet under ansvar.
* Möjlighet att påverka arbetssätt, processer och affärer.
* En kultur där resultat, engagemang och initiativ uppskattas.


 Vi söker inte någon som bara vill ha ett jobb.
   

  

 Vi söker någon som vill vara med och bygga något riktigt bra.
   

  

**Placering:** 
 Stockholm (Vasagatan 28)
   

  

**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Tror du att du kan göra skillnad? Då vill vi gärna höra från dig.

title: Sales Engineer - Sweden
description:
**Job Title**
 Sales Engineer - Sweden
   

  

**Job Description**
 Axis has something great to offer! We are looking for a new Sales Engineer to join our Nordic team based in Stockholm.
   

  

**WHAT IS AXIS?**
 Axis is a fast-growing and innovative IT company with a global footprint. Our products and solutions focus on security surveillance and remote monitoring based on innovative, modern, and open technology platforms. This is a Swedish-based company with around 6000 employees in more than 50 countries. Axis offers a multicultural workplace with an open corporate culture. We allow and spur our employees' independent thinking. Here we bring together talented and creative people working towards the same goal - innovating for a smarter, safer world!
   

  

**WHAT WILL YOU DO?**
 As a Sales Engineer your mission is to deliver exceptional pre-sales engineering support to our partners and customers. By developing strong relationships as a trusted advisor, you help us drive sales growth and customer satisfaction. You work in close collaboration with our sales and marketing teams and your responsibilities includes product demoes, project design support, events, customer meetings and supporting colleagues and partners on technical and product related matters. In this role you’ll be in a unique position to learn the latest about our products and solutions and how they are used in a broad range of application areas, from security to industry projects. You will work daily with our products, partners, and customers and have responsibility for our Stockholm showroom, ensuring it remains up to date and inspiring. Your primary focus will be the Stockholm area, with occasional assignments in other parts of Sweden and the Nordic countries.
   

  

 This is a hybrid role, based in the Stockholm area, with commuting distance to our office in Kungsholmen.
   

  

 Responsibilities will include but not be limited to:
   

  

* Deliver project design support by designing Axis solutions that meet customer needs.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor and expert internally and externall
* Demonstrate, configure and setup Axis solutions for proof of concepts and demoes.
* Participate in trade shows, customer meetings, events and trainings
* Enable product sales by showcasing a strong business acumen
* Actively collaborate with partners and colleagues
* Develop your own skills and expertise continuously
* Keep updated on latest developments in the industry
* Responsible for our Stockholm showroom


**WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?**
 We're seeking an enthusiastic engineer passionate about technology, customers, training and business. You have a keen interest in helping our partners find the best possible Axis solution that meet end customer needs in security and beyond. You are a team player and have a passion for achieving results through others. You can hold inspiring presentations and can explain complex technical topics to a mix of audiences.
   

  

 The right candidate has experience of working in pre-sales, ideally within the CCTV industry or within the IT industry. You are knowledgeable about networking and IP-based technologies. You are a keen and quick learner who always seek to learn and develop in your day-to-day work. Finally, you are creative, curious and passionate for technology.
   

  

 The role involves frequent traveling (approx. 30%) in Sweden, and occasional travels in the Nordics countries.
   

  

 Apart from this you have the following qualifications and experience:
   

  

* Degree in computer science or engineering preferred
* Minimum of 5 years’ experience from technical position in the IT or security industry
* Track record of delivering customer demonstrations and training sessions
* Outgoing with excellent communication skills
* Experience of working in a fast-paced sales environment
* Fluent in Swedish and English, both spoken and written (mandatory)
* Knowledge of network infrastructure is a plus
* Valid driver’s license


**WHAT CAN AXIS OFFER?**
 In Axis you will work in an international organization with enthusiastic people in an open minded and innovative culture. We are growing rapidly which means that new challenges and opportunities to grow both personally and professionally occur every day!
   

  

**READY TO ACT?**
 Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. The first step of becoming an Axis employee is easy – all you have to do is apply
   

  

 Type of Employment
   

  

 Permanent Employment
   

  

 Posting End Date
   

  

 2026-08-11
   

  

*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* 
*Notice will be provided before we take any action.*
**About Axis Communications**
 We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
   

  

 With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.
   

  

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**
 For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.
   

  

 Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast

title: Commercial Product Manager
description:
At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.
   

  

 Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.
   

  

 Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
   

  

*As Commercial Product Manager, you take end-to-end commercial ownership of your product area. Acting as the business driver behind growth, profitability and market relevance. You define where we play, how we win and how our offerings create measurable value for customers. By combining customer insights, market trends and close internal collaboration, you turn strategy into concrete roadmaps, propositions and scalable business models that strengthen Tele2’s competitive position.*
 At Tele2’s B2B unit (Business to Business), we work with a broad portfolio of IT and telecom products and services. We support customers of all sizes – from micro businesses to large enterprises and the public sector – helping them digitalize, secure and develop their business potential.
   

  

 As friendly experts, we combine deep expertise with a practical, customer-focused approach. Working in B2B means collaborating closely with our customers to create solutions that drive business value, strong customer experiences and sustainable growth.
   

  

**About The Job**
 The product area focus is to delivers mobile phones, accessories, and other workplace-supporting hardware to meet customer needs and create added value. The team is responsible for developing and maintaining one of Sweden’s most competitive and cost-efficient product portfolios. We set the product strategy, roadmap and priorities all to ensure profitability, customer relevance, and long-term growth.
   

  

* P&L ownership: manage profitability, budget, forecasting, and follow-up for your portfolio.
* Product portfolio management: own, develop, and optimize the portfolio to ensure competitiveness and relevance.
* Commercial strategy & roadmap: design and execute the product strategy, ensuring clear priorities and long-term growth.
* Market and technology insight: stay at the forefront of trends to drive innovation in products, business models, and propositions.
* Customer-centric development: lead initiatives aligned with customer needs.
* Business steering: define agreements, business rules, partnerships, and frameworks to secure performance and scalability.
* Collaboration & delivery: work closely with Supply chain, Device, DCT, customer operations and Sales to ensure product delivery.


**Who are you?**
 To thrive and succeed in this role we believe that you have...
   

  

* Strong commercial mindset with P&L ownership and sharp business acumen.
* Ability to turn ideas into successful products and drive innovation.
* Excellent communicator and team player with strong stakeholder management skills.
* Your ability to drive results spans both strategic and hands-on operational activities.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English, both written and spoken, is essential.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office 365 is a must


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience within IT and Telco sectors and familiarity with various product areas is a valued asset, although not mandatory.
* Ability to compile presentations for diverse set of stakeholders and higher management teams


 We believe that you are an individual with strong ambition to make a change. You are probably a forward thinker updated on the latest trends and market needs. In addition, you are a team player, business savvy and detailed oriented, all complemented with a drive to change the status quo and improve on past performances. You can present and communicate innovative ideas and complex matters in a way all types of stakeholders understand.
   

  

**A few words from the manager**
*My name is Martin Östberg, and I am the manager of Tele2 B2B Business Management & Sales enablement team for Managed IT services including hosting and hybrid cloud services, digital workplace offering as well as handsets and accessories together with our e-commerce offering within B2B.
   

  

 In my team, we encourage each other to be innovative, proactive and too think outside the box. We are committed to integrating sustainability and customer experience into our business strategies.
   

  

 I would be thrilled to see you as a new member of our future-oriented team!*
**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Senior Risk Manager & Scheduler– Offshore Wind
description:
**Job Description**
**This position may be located in any Ramboll office with an established team in the following countries: Germany, Spain, Portugal, The Netherlands, United Kingdom, Denmark, Sweden, Norway, Poland, Australia, Taiwan, Japan and South Korea. When applying, please specify your preferred country.**
 Are you passionate about driving the green energy transition? Do you want to help achieve global and national net-zero goals through offshore wind energy projects? Are you an expert in risk management and scheduling and understand the particularities of offshore wind project development and execution?
   

  

 If this sounds like you, or you’re curious to learn more, then this role could be the perfect opportunity. Join our Wind Development, Construction and Operations Advisory organisation as our new Senior Risk Manager & Scheduler – Offshore Wind and work with us to close the gap to a sustainable future.
   

  

**Your new role**
 As our new Senior Risk Manager & Scheduler for Offshore Wind, you will be part of our global Wind organisation and our Strategy & Commercial sub-service area. In your position, you will take a leading role in the delivery and development of our project’s control services, covering risk management and scheduling activities, for offshore wind projects throughout different project phases.
   

  

 Your key responsibilities will be:
   

  

  

* Lead development and maintenance of integrated project schedules.
* Define project controls frameworks, governance structures and reporting standards for offshore and onshore wind projects.
* Facilitate risk workshops and maintain project risk registers.
* Perform qualitative and quantitative risk assessments including integrated schedule and cost risk analysis.
* Develop mitigation plans and monitor risk reduction actions.
* Support project governance, FID preparation and executive reporting.
* Provide project controls advice across development, procurement, fabrication, installation and commissioning phases.
* Mentor junior consultants and support capability development.
* Support business development, proposals and strategic client relationships.
* Drive continuous improvement of methodologies and digital tools.


**About You**
* Minimum 8 years of experience in offshore wind or major energy infrastructure projects.
* Extensive project controls, PMO and risk management experience.
* Hands-on scheduling experience using Primavera P6 or equivalent tools.
* Experience performing Monte Carlo base quantitative schedule risk and cost risk analyses.
* Excellent commercial understanding and experience presenting to client executives and investment stakeholders.
* Collaborative working style, an analytical mindset and structured communication and clear Client focus


**What We Can Offer You**
* Commitment to your development
* Leaders guided by our Leadership Principles
* A culture that welcomes you as the unique person you are
* Inspiration from colleagues, clients, and projects
* The long-term thinking of a foundation-owned company
* Flexible working environment with the possibility of working from home a few days a week
* Private health and life insurance
* Wellness benefit contribution of up to 4.000 SEK/year


**Ready to join us?**
 Please submit your application and CV online. We invite diversity in all its forms and encourage applicants from all groups to apply.
   

  

**Work at the heart of sustainable change with Ramboll**
 Ramboll is a global architecture, engineering, and consultancy company. As a foundation-owned people company, founded in Denmark, we believe that the purpose of sustainable change is to create a thriving world for both nature and people. So, that’s where we start – and how we work. Our history is rooted in a clear vision of how a responsible company should act and being open and curious is a cornerstone of our culture. Ramboll employs more than 18,000 people globally across 35 countries. Ramboll experts deliver innovative solutions across Buildings, Transport, Water, Environment & Health, Energy, Management Consulting, and Architecture & Landscape. Combining local experience with global knowledge, we help shape the societies of tomorrow.
   

  

**Equality, Diversity, and Inclusion**
 Equality, diversity, and inclusion are at the heart of what we do. At Ramboll, we believe that diversity is a strength and that different experiences and perspectives are essential to creating truly sustainable societies. We are committed to providing an inclusive and supportive work environment where everyone is able to flourish and reach their potential. We also know how important it is to achieve the right balance of where, when, and how much you work. At Ramboll, we offer flexibility as part of our positive and inclusive approach to work. We invite applications from candidates of all backgrounds and characteristics. Please let us know if there are any changes we could make to the application process to make it more comfortable for you. You can contact us at job.advert.accessibility@ramboll.com with such requests.

title: Host Service & Reception Night (m/f/d) - New Opening
description:
**At Ruby, your personality really matters, your time really matters, and we strongly believe we groove way better** 
**together. At Ruby, we keep breaking new ground.**
 Hey Sunshine,
   

  

 You think travelling is more than just the next summer holiday, but the
 **feeling of being at home anywhere in the world** 
 ? That your workplace should be a place with
 **personality and soul** 
 , where new ideas come to life? Then you are the missing olive in our Martini, the missing melody in our music, and the
 **heartbeat of our Ruby Frida** 
 .
   

  

 Our Ruby Frida dances to the rhythm of Stockholm – a city that never stands still, reinventing itself while staying true to its roots. From ABBA’s timeless melodies to the bold grooves born at nearby Cheiron Studios, we’ve blended Sweden’s crisp modernism with playful retro touches and Stockholm’s swinging ’60s pop scene. It’s a place to unwind, tune into the local beat, and feel the city’s cultural pulse. With 187 rooms, Ruby Frida rises in Kungsholmen, just steps from Fridhemsplan station. From here, Stockholm’s Old Town, lively café culture, green parks and glittering waterways are all within easy reach.
   

  

 We are a fast-growing hospitality group with existing hotels and workspaces in some of
 **Europe's most exciting locations** 
 and many more projects under construction. We
 **break new ground** 
 with our
 **Lean Luxury philosophy** 
 , creating a contemporary and affordable form of luxury.
   

  

**The role is set to start in May, just in time for the opening of our hotel in June. First interviews are planned for the end of March, and those invited to our first audition will hear from us separately.**
**Join us and make it your own story**
**Trust Us, You Won't Get Bored, As You**
* are not only an all-rounder and multitasking talent, but also the first point of contact for our guests to make them feel at home from the very first moment to the last drink
* prepare cocktails, drinks, and delicious snacks with a few skillful moves, ensuring smooth and seamless service
* lovingly take care of the preparation of our breakfast buffet and set the tables for the next morning
* hold down the fort at night and look after the house and guests
* handle the end-of-day closing with care, ensuring everything runs smoothly and stays on track
* share your insider tips with our guests, pointing them to the best hotspots in the city


**We've Been Waiting For You, Since You Have/are**
* ideally gained some experience in the hotel industry, don’t worry if you don’t know what "mise-en-place" means yet 😉
* a true night owl, who enjoys working primarily at night and in shifts, while always keeping everything under control
* counting reliability, multitasking and your willingness to learn among your strengths
* empathetic with others and love sharing your enthusiasm with those around you
* a great sense of humour, enjoy working in a team, and love interacting with our guests
* speaking fluently Swedish and English


**What's in for you? That's how we groove:**
**Ruby, Ruby, Ruby**
* your style, your smile, your ideas – bring your personality to work. Maybe even with a new tattoo, piercing or hair colour on us?
* better together – at work, during team events or just because it’s Monday 😉


**'Cause I'm having a good time**
* less work, same money – for us, full-time means 35 hours and every hour counts
* no more excuses – we support your sports program
* LEGEN...wait for it...DARY staff rates - for you and your travel buddy


**Money, Money, Money**
* sip, snack, repeat - with your Ruby F&B Credit
* no matter how you get to work – a mobility allowance comes on top
* take it to the next level – secure yourself some extra cash through profit-sharing, talent scouting and positive reviews


**Ain't no mountain high enough**
* level up your game – with trainings, coaching, and mentoring, you get the chance to grow, just like Ruby does
* innovation is part of our DNA – Lean Luxury, paperless, cashless, … you name it


**Where have you been so long?**
 Whether you’re a
 **social butterfly** 
 with a flair for cocktail-shaking, a creative soul with an eye for design, or a pro at planning and
 **behind-the-scenes magic** 
 - there’s a place for you at Ruby. We’re always looking for
 **friendly faces and passionate team players** 
 .
   

  

 Not perfect CVs, but
 **great personalities** 
 , who’ll help us create hotels and workspaces with
 **character and soul** 
 . So, whatever makes you tick, join us and start your Ruby story.
   

  

**Diversity, Equity & Inclusion**
 We believe that...
   

  

* you can love whoever you want to
* you should decide for yourself whether and with which pronouns you would like to be addressed
* you can be proud of your heritage and culture
* you don't have to justify your religion or world view
* you are good, just as you are and make our team and Ruby's diversity unique


 We can't deal with: isms
   

  

 Racism, sexism, heterosexism, antisemitism, and such kind of isms are not tolerated here.
   

  

 If You Want To Know What To Expect, Listen To Abdoulie's Story From Our Ruby Rosi In Munich. You Can Find Even More Ruby Stories Here
   

  

 www.ruby-hotels.com/stories
   

  

 Get to know our People & Culture Team
